nvme_spec.h

1/* SPDX-License-Identifier: BSD-3-Clause
2 * Copyright (C) 2015 Intel Corporation. All rights reserved.

5
6/**
7 * \file
8 * NVMe specification definitions
9 */
10
11#ifndef SPDK_NVME_SPEC_H
12#define SPDK_NVME_SPEC_H
13
14#include "spdk/stdinc.h"
15
16#ifdef __cplusplus
17extern "C" {
18#endif
19
20#include "spdk/assert.h"
21
22/**
23 * Use to mark a command to apply to all namespaces, or to retrieve global
24 * log pages.
25 */
26#define SPDK_NVME_GLOBAL_NS_TAG ((uint32_t)0xFFFFFFFF)
27
28#define SPDK_NVME_MAX_IO_QUEUES (65535)
29
30#define SPDK_NVME_QUEUE_MIN_ENTRIES (2)
31
32#define SPDK_NVME_ADMIN_QUEUE_MIN_ENTRIES SPDK_NVME_QUEUE_MIN_ENTRIES
33#define SPDK_NVME_ADMIN_QUEUE_MAX_ENTRIES 4096
34
35/* Controllers with quirk NVME_QUIRK_MINIMUM_ADMIN_QUEUE_SIZE must have
36 * admin queue size entries that are an even multiple of this number.
37 */
38#define SPDK_NVME_ADMIN_QUEUE_QUIRK_ENTRIES_MULTIPLE 64
39
40#define SPDK_NVME_IO_QUEUE_MIN_ENTRIES SPDK_NVME_QUEUE_MIN_ENTRIES
41#define SPDK_NVME_IO_QUEUE_MAX_ENTRIES 65536
42
43/**
44 * Indicates the maximum number of range sets that may be specified
45 * in the dataset management command.
46 */
47#define SPDK_NVME_DATASET_MANAGEMENT_MAX_RANGES 256
48
49/**
50 * Maximum number of blocks that may be specified in a single dataset management range.
51 */
52#define SPDK_NVME_DATASET_MANAGEMENT_RANGE_MAX_BLOCKS 0xFFFFFFFFu
53
54/**
55 * Maximum number of entries in the log page of Changed Namespace List.
56 */
57#define SPDK_NVME_MAX_CHANGED_NAMESPACES 1024
58
59#define SPDK_NVME_DOORBELL_REGISTER_SIZE 4
60
61union spdk_nvme_cap_register {
62 uint64_t raw;
63 struct {
64 /** maximum queue entries supported */
65 uint32_t mqes : 16;
66
67 /** contiguous queues required */
68 uint32_t cqr : 1;
69
70 /** arbitration mechanism supported */
71 uint32_t ams : 2;
72
73 uint32_t reserved1 : 5;
74
75 /** timeout */
76 uint32_t to : 8;
77
78 /** doorbell stride */
79 uint32_t dstrd : 4;
80
81 /** NVM subsystem reset supported */
82 uint32_t nssrs : 1;
83
84 /** command sets supported */
85 uint32_t css : 8;
86
87 /** boot partition support */
88 uint32_t bps : 1;
89
90 uint32_t reserved2 : 2;
91
92 /** memory page size minimum */
93 uint32_t mpsmin : 4;
94
95 /** memory page size maximum */
96 uint32_t mpsmax : 4;
97
98 /** persistent memory region supported */
99 uint32_t pmrs : 1;
100
101 /** controller memory buffer supported */
102 uint32_t cmbs : 1;
103
104 /** NVM subsystem shutdown supported */
105 uint32_t nsss : 1;
106
107 /** controller ready with media support */
108 uint32_t crwms : 1;
109
110 /** controller ready independent of media support */
111 uint32_t crims : 1;
112
113 uint32_t reserved3 : 3;
114 } bits;
115};
116SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_cap_register) == 8, "Incorrect size");
117
118/**
119 * I/O Command Set Selected
120 *
121 * Only a single command set is defined as of NVMe 1.3 (NVM). Later, it became
122 * possible to disable I/O Command Sets, that is, configuring it to only use the
123 * Admin Command Set. With 1.4c and Namespace Types, additional I/O Command Sets
124 * are available.
125 */
126enum spdk_nvme_cc_css {
127 SPDK_NVME_CC_CSS_NVM = 0x0, /**< NVM command set */
128 SPDK_NVME_CC_CSS_IOCS = 0x6, /**< One or more I/O command sets */
129 SPDK_NVME_CC_CSS_NOIO = 0x7, /**< No I/O, only admin */
130};
131
132#define SPDK_NVME_CAP_CSS_NVM (1u << SPDK_NVME_CC_CSS_NVM) /**< NVM command set supported */
133#define SPDK_NVME_CAP_CSS_IOCS (1u << SPDK_NVME_CC_CSS_IOCS) /**< One or more I/O Command sets supported */
134#define SPDK_NVME_CAP_CSS_NOIO (1u << SPDK_NVME_CC_CSS_NOIO) /**< No I/O, only admin */
135
136union spdk_nvme_cc_register {
137 uint32_t raw;
138 struct {
139 /** enable */
140 uint32_t en : 1;
141
142 uint32_t reserved1 : 3;
143
144 /** i/o command set selected */
145 uint32_t css : 3;
146
147 /** memory page size */
148 uint32_t mps : 4;
149
150 /** arbitration mechanism selected */
151 uint32_t ams : 3;
152
153 /** shutdown notification */
154 uint32_t shn : 2;
155
156 /** i/o submission queue entry size */
157 uint32_t iosqes : 4;
158
159 /** i/o completion queue entry size */
160 uint32_t iocqes : 4;
161
162 /** controller ready independent of media enable */
163 uint32_t crime : 1;
164
165 uint32_t reserved2 : 7;
166 } bits;
167};
168SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_cc_register) == 4, "Incorrect size");
169
170enum spdk_nvme_shn_value {
171 SPDK_NVME_SHN_NORMAL = 0x1,
172 SPDK_NVME_SHN_ABRUPT = 0x2,
173};
174
175union spdk_nvme_csts_register {
176 uint32_t raw;
177 struct {
178 /** ready */
179 uint32_t rdy : 1;
180
181 /** controller fatal status */
182 uint32_t cfs : 1;
183
184 /** shutdown status */
185 uint32_t shst : 2;
186
187 /** NVM subsystem reset occurred */
188 uint32_t nssro : 1;
189
190 /** Processing paused */
191 uint32_t pp : 1;
192
193 uint32_t reserved1 : 26;
194 } bits;
195};
196SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_csts_register) == 4, "Incorrect size");
197
198enum spdk_nvme_shst_value {
199 SPDK_NVME_SHST_NORMAL = 0x0,
200 SPDK_NVME_SHST_OCCURRING = 0x1,
201 SPDK_NVME_SHST_COMPLETE = 0x2,
202};
203
204union spdk_nvme_aqa_register {
205 uint32_t raw;
206 struct {
207 /** admin submission queue size */
208 uint32_t asqs : 12;
209
210 uint32_t reserved1 : 4;
211
212 /** admin completion queue size */
213 uint32_t acqs : 12;
214
215 uint32_t reserved2 : 4;
216 } bits;
217};
218SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_aqa_register) == 4, "Incorrect size");
219
220union spdk_nvme_vs_register {
221 uint32_t raw;
222 struct {
223 /** indicates the tertiary version */
224 uint32_t ter : 8;
225 /** indicates the minor version */
226 uint32_t mnr : 8;
227 /** indicates the major version */
228 uint32_t mjr : 16;
229 } bits;
230};
231SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_vs_register) == 4, "Incorrect size");
232
233/** Generate raw version in the same format as \ref spdk_nvme_vs_register for comparison. */
234#define SPDK_NVME_VERSION(mjr, mnr, ter) \
235 (((uint32_t)(mjr) << 16) | \
236 ((uint32_t)(mnr) << 8) | \
237 (uint32_t)(ter))
238
239/* Test that the shifts are correct */
240SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(SPDK_NVME_VERSION(1, 0, 0) == 0x00010000, "version macro error");
241SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(SPDK_NVME_VERSION(1, 2, 1) == 0x00010201, "version macro error");
242
243union spdk_nvme_cmbloc_register {
244 uint32_t raw;
245 struct {
246 /** indicator of BAR which contains controller memory buffer(CMB) */
247 uint32_t bir : 3;
248 uint32_t reserved1 : 9;
249 /** offset of CMB in multiples of the size unit */
250 uint32_t ofst : 20;
251 } bits;
252};
253SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_cmbloc_register) == 4, "Incorrect size");
254
255union spdk_nvme_cmbsz_register {
256 uint32_t raw;
257 struct {
258 /** support submission queues in CMB */
259 uint32_t sqs : 1;
260 /** support completion queues in CMB */
261 uint32_t cqs : 1;
262 /** support PRP and SGLs lists in CMB */
263 uint32_t lists : 1;
264 /** support read data and metadata in CMB */
265 uint32_t rds : 1;
266 /** support write data and metadata in CMB */
267 uint32_t wds : 1;
268 uint32_t reserved1 : 3;
269 /** indicates the granularity of the size unit */
270 uint32_t szu : 4;
271 /** size of CMB in multiples of the size unit */
272 uint32_t sz : 20;
273 } bits;
274};
275SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_cmbsz_register) == 4, "Incorrect size");
276
277union spdk_nvme_cmbmsc_register {
278 uint64_t raw;
279 struct {
280 /** capability registers enabled */
281 uint64_t cre : 1;
282
283 /** controller memory space enable */
284 uint64_t cmse : 1;
285
286 uint64_t reserved : 10;
287
288 /** controller base address */
289 uint64_t cba : 52;
290 } bits;
291
292};
293SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_cmbmsc_register) == 8, "Incorrect size");
294
295union spdk_nvme_cmbsts_register {
296 uint32_t raw;
297 struct {
298 /** controller base address invalid */
299 uint32_t cbai : 1;
300
301 uint32_t reserved : 31;
302 } bits;
303};
304SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_cmbsts_register) == 4, "Incorrect size");
305
306union spdk_nvme_cmbebs_register {
307 uint32_t raw;
308 struct {
309 /** CMB Elasticity Buffer Size Units */
310 uint32_t cmbszu : 4;
311 /** CMB Read Bypass Behavior */
312 uint32_t cmbrbb : 1;
313
314 uint32_t reserved : 3;
315 /** CMB elasticity buffer size base */
316 uint32_t cmbwbz : 24;
317 } bits;
318};
319SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_cmbebs_register) == 4, "Incorrect size");
320
321union spdk_nvme_cmbswtp_register {
322 uint32_t raw;
323 struct {
324 /** CMB Sustained Write Throughput Units */
325 uint32_t cmbswtu : 4;
326
327 uint32_t reserved : 4;
328 /** CMB Sustained Write Throughput */
329 uint32_t cmbswtv : 24;
330 } bits;
331};
332SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_cmbswtp_register) == 4, "Incorrect size");
333
334union spdk_nvme_crto_register {
335 uint32_t raw;
336 struct {
337 /** Controller Ready With Media Timeout */
338 uint32_t crwmt : 16;
339 /** Controller Ready Independent of Media Timeout */
340 uint32_t crimt : 16;
341 } bits;
342};
343SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_crto_register) == 4, "Incorrect size");
344
345
346union spdk_nvme_pmrcap_register {
347 uint32_t raw;
348 struct {
349 uint32_t reserved1 : 3;
350
351 /** read data support */
352 uint32_t rds : 1;
353
354 /** write data support */
355 uint32_t wds : 1;
356
357 /** base indicator register */
358 uint32_t bir : 3;
359
360 /**
361 * persistent memory region time units
362 * 00b: 500 milliseconds
363 * 01b: minutes
364 */
365 uint32_t pmrtu : 2;
366
367 /** persistent memory region write barrier mechanisms */
368 uint32_t pmrwbm : 4;
369
370 uint32_t reserved2 : 2;
371
372 /** persistent memory region timeout */
373 uint32_t pmrto : 8;
374
375 /** controller memory space supported */
376 uint32_t cmss : 1;
377
378 uint32_t reserved3 : 7;
379 } bits;
380};
381SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_pmrcap_register) == 4, "Incorrect size");
382
383union spdk_nvme_pmrctl_register {
384 uint32_t raw;
385 struct {
386 /** enable */
387 uint32_t en : 1;
388
389 uint32_t reserved : 31;
390 } bits;
391};
392SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_pmrctl_register) == 4, "Incorrect size");
393
394union spdk_nvme_pmrsts_register {
395 uint32_t raw;
396 struct {
397 /** err */
398 uint32_t err : 8;
399
400 /** not ready */
401 uint32_t nrdy : 1;
402
403 /**
404 * health status
405 * 000b: Normal Operation
406 * 001b: Restore Error
407 * 010b: Read Only
408 * 011b: Unreliable
409 */
410 uint32_t hsts : 3;
411
412 /** controller base address invalid */
413 uint32_t cbai : 1;
414
415 uint32_t reserved : 19;
416 } bits;
417};
418SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_pmrsts_register) == 4, "Incorrect size");
419
420union spdk_nvme_pmrebs_register {
421 uint32_t raw;
422 struct {
423 /**
424 * pmr elasticity buffer size units
425 * 0h: Bytes
426 * 1h: 1 KiB
427 * 2h: 1 MiB
428 * 3h: 1 GiB
429 */
430 uint32_t pmrszu : 4;
431
432 /** read bypass behavior */
433 uint32_t rbb : 1;
434
435 uint32_t reserved : 3;
436
437 /** pmr elasticity buffer size base */
438 uint32_t pmrwbz : 24;
439 } bits;
440};
441SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_pmrebs_register) == 4, "Incorrect size");
442
443union spdk_nvme_pmrswtp_register {
444 uint32_t raw;
445 struct {
446 /**
447 * pmr sustained write throughput units
448 * 0h: Bytes per second
449 * 1h: 1 KiB / s
450 * 2h: 1 MiB / s
451 * 3h: 1 GiB / s
452 */
453 uint32_t pmrswtu : 4;
454
455 uint32_t reserved : 4;
456
457 /** pmr sustained write throughput */
458 uint32_t pmrswtv : 24;
459 } bits;
460};
461SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_pmrswtp_register) == 4, "Incorrect size");
462
463union spdk_nvme_pmrmscl_register {
464 uint32_t raw;
465 struct {
466 uint32_t reserved1 : 1;
467
468 /** controller memory space enable */
469 uint32_t cmse : 1;
470
471 uint32_t reserved2 : 10;
472
473 /** controller base address */
474 uint32_t cba : 20;
475 } bits;
476};
477SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_pmrmscl_register) == 4, "Incorrect size");
478
479/** Boot partition information */
480union spdk_nvme_bpinfo_register {
481 uint32_t raw;
482 struct {
483 /** Boot partition size in 128KB multiples */
484 uint32_t bpsz : 15;
485
486 uint32_t reserved1 : 9;
487
488 /**
489 * Boot read status
490 * 00b: No Boot Partition read operation requested
491 * 01b: Boot Partition read in progress
492 * 10b: Boot Partition read completed successfully
493 * 11b: Error completing Boot Partition read
494 */
495 uint32_t brs : 2;
496
497 uint32_t reserved2 : 5;
498
499 /** Active Boot Partition ID */
500 uint32_t abpid : 1;
501 } bits;
502};
503SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_bpinfo_register) == 4, "Incorrect size");
504
505/** Boot read status values */
506enum spdk_nvme_brs_value {
507 SPDK_NVME_BRS_NO_READ = 0x0,
508 SPDK_NVME_BRS_READ_IN_PROGRESS = 0x1,
509 SPDK_NVME_BRS_READ_SUCCESS = 0x2,
510 SPDK_NVME_BRS_READ_ERROR = 0x3,
511};
512
513/** Boot partition read select */
514union spdk_nvme_bprsel_register {
515 uint32_t raw;
516 struct {
517 /** Boot partition read size in multiples of 4KB */
518 uint32_t bprsz : 10;
519
520 /** Boot partition read offset in multiples of 4KB */
521 uint32_t bprof : 20;
522
523 uint32_t reserved : 1;
524
525 /** Boot Partition Identifier */
526 uint32_t bpid : 1;
527 } bits;
528};
529SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_bprsel_register) == 4, "Incorrect size");
530
531/** Value to write to NSSR to indicate a NVM subsystem reset ("NVMe") */
532#define SPDK_NVME_NSSR_VALUE 0x4E564D65
533
534struct spdk_nvme_registers {
535 /** controller capabilities */
536 union spdk_nvme_cap_register cap;
537
538 /** version of NVMe specification */
539 union spdk_nvme_vs_register vs;
540 uint32_t intms; /* interrupt mask set */
541 uint32_t intmc; /* interrupt mask clear */
542
543 /** controller configuration */
544 union spdk_nvme_cc_register cc;
545
546 uint32_t reserved1;
547 union spdk_nvme_csts_register csts; /* controller status */
548 uint32_t nssr; /* NVM subsystem reset */
549
550 /** admin queue attributes */
551 union spdk_nvme_aqa_register aqa;
552
553 uint64_t asq; /* admin submission queue base addr */
554 uint64_t acq; /* admin completion queue base addr */
555 /** controller memory buffer location */
556 union spdk_nvme_cmbloc_register cmbloc;
557 /** controller memory buffer size */
558 union spdk_nvme_cmbsz_register cmbsz;
559
560 /** boot partition information */
561 union spdk_nvme_bpinfo_register bpinfo;
562
563 /** boot partition read select */
564 union spdk_nvme_bprsel_register bprsel;
565
566 /** boot partition memory buffer location (must be 4KB aligned) */
567 uint64_t bpmbl;
568
569 /** controller memory buffer memory space control */
570 union spdk_nvme_cmbmsc_register cmbmsc;
571
572 /** controller memory buffer status */
573 union spdk_nvme_cmbsts_register cmbsts;
574
575 /** controller memory buffer elasticity buffer size */
576 union spdk_nvme_cmbebs_register cmbebs;
577
578 /** controller memory buffer sustained write throughput */
579 union spdk_nvme_cmbswtp_register cmbswtp;
580
581 /** NVM subsystem shutdown */
582 uint32_t nssd;
583
584 /** controller ready timeouts */
585 union spdk_nvme_crto_register crto;
586
587 uint32_t reserved2[0x365];
588
589 /** persistent memory region capabilities */
590 union spdk_nvme_pmrcap_register pmrcap;
591
592 /** persistent memory region control */
593 union spdk_nvme_pmrctl_register pmrctl;
594
595 /** persistent memory region status */
596 union spdk_nvme_pmrsts_register pmrsts;
597
598 /** persistent memory region elasticity buffer size */
599 union spdk_nvme_pmrebs_register pmrebs;
600
601 /** persistent memory region sustained write throughput */
602 union spdk_nvme_pmrswtp_register pmrswtp;
603
604 /** persistent memory region memory space control lower */
605 union spdk_nvme_pmrmscl_register pmrmscl;
606
607 uint32_t pmrmscu; /* persistent memory region memory space control upper */
608
609 uint32_t reserved3[0x79];
610
611 struct {
612 uint32_t sq_tdbl; /* submission queue tail doorbell */
613 uint32_t cq_hdbl; /* completion queue head doorbell */
614 } doorbell[1];
615};
616
617/* NVMe controller register space offsets */
618SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(0x00 == offsetof(struct spdk_nvme_registers, cap),
619 "Incorrect register offset");
620SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(0x08 == offsetof(struct spdk_nvme_registers, vs), "Incorrect register offset");
621SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(0x0C == offsetof(struct spdk_nvme_registers, intms),
622 "Incorrect register offset");
623SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(0x10 == offsetof(struct spdk_nvme_registers, intmc),
624 "Incorrect register offset");
625SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(0x14 == offsetof(struct spdk_nvme_registers, cc), "Incorrect register offset");
626SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(0x1C == offsetof(struct spdk_nvme_registers, csts), "Incorrect register offset");
627SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(0x20 == offsetof(struct spdk_nvme_registers, nssr), "Incorrect register offset");
628SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(0x24 == offsetof(struct spdk_nvme_registers, aqa), "Incorrect register offset");
629SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(0x28 == offsetof(struct spdk_nvme_registers, asq), "Incorrect register offset");
630SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(0x30 == offsetof(struct spdk_nvme_registers, acq), "Incorrect register offset");
631SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(0x38 == offsetof(struct spdk_nvme_registers, cmbloc),
632 "Incorrect register offset");
633SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(0x3C == offsetof(struct spdk_nvme_registers, cmbsz),
634 "Incorrect register offset");
635SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(0x40 == offsetof(struct spdk_nvme_registers, bpinfo),
636 "Incorrect register offset");
637SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(0x44 == offsetof(struct spdk_nvme_registers, bprsel),
638 "Incorrect register offset");
639SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(0x48 == offsetof(struct spdk_nvme_registers, bpmbl),
640 "Incorrect register offset");
641SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(0x50 == offsetof(struct spdk_nvme_registers, cmbmsc),
642 "Incorrect register offset");
643SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(0x58 == offsetof(struct spdk_nvme_registers, cmbsts),
644 "Incorrect register offset");
645SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(0x5C == offsetof(struct spdk_nvme_registers, cmbebs),
646 "Incorrect register offset");
647SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(0x60 == offsetof(struct spdk_nvme_registers, cmbswtp),
648 "Incorrect register offset");
649SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(0x64 == offsetof(struct spdk_nvme_registers, nssd),
650 "Incorrect register offset");
651SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(0x68 == offsetof(struct spdk_nvme_registers, crto),
652 "Incorrect register offset");
653SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(0xE00 == offsetof(struct spdk_nvme_registers, pmrcap),
654 "Incorrect register offset");
655SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(0xE04 == offsetof(struct spdk_nvme_registers, pmrctl),
656 "Incorrect register offset");
657SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(0xE08 == offsetof(struct spdk_nvme_registers, pmrsts),
658 "Incorrect register offset");
659SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(0xE0C == offsetof(struct spdk_nvme_registers, pmrebs),
660 "Incorrect register offset");
661SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(0xE10 == offsetof(struct spdk_nvme_registers, pmrswtp),
662 "Incorrect register offset");
663SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(0xE14 == offsetof(struct spdk_nvme_registers, pmrmscl),
664 "Incorrect register offset");
665SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(0xE18 == offsetof(struct spdk_nvme_registers, pmrmscu),
666 "Incorrect register offset");
667
668enum spdk_nvme_sgl_descriptor_type {
669 SPDK_NVME_SGL_TYPE_DATA_BLOCK = 0x0,
670 SPDK_NVME_SGL_TYPE_BIT_BUCKET = 0x1,
671 SPDK_NVME_SGL_TYPE_SEGMENT = 0x2,
672 SPDK_NVME_SGL_TYPE_LAST_SEGMENT = 0x3,
673 SPDK_NVME_SGL_TYPE_KEYED_DATA_BLOCK = 0x4,
674 SPDK_NVME_SGL_TYPE_TRANSPORT_DATA_BLOCK = 0x5,
675 /* 0x6 - 0xE reserved */
676 SPDK_NVME_SGL_TYPE_VENDOR_SPECIFIC = 0xF
677};
678
679enum spdk_nvme_sgl_descriptor_subtype {
680 SPDK_NVME_SGL_SUBTYPE_ADDRESS = 0x0,
681 SPDK_NVME_SGL_SUBTYPE_OFFSET = 0x1,
682 SPDK_NVME_SGL_SUBTYPE_TRANSPORT = 0xa,
683};
684
685#pragma pack(push, 1)
686struct spdk_nvme_sgl_descriptor {
687 uint64_t address;
688 union {
689 struct {
690 uint8_t reserved[7];
691 uint8_t subtype : 4;
692 uint8_t type : 4;
693 } generic;
694
695 struct {
696 uint32_t length;
697 uint8_t reserved[3];
698 uint8_t subtype : 4;
699 uint8_t type : 4;
700 } unkeyed;
701
702 struct {
703 uint64_t length : 24;
704 uint64_t key : 32;
705 uint64_t subtype : 4;
706 uint64_t type : 4;
707 } keyed;
708 };
709};
710SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_sgl_descriptor) == 16, "Incorrect size");
711#pragma pack(pop)
712
713enum spdk_nvme_psdt_value {
714 SPDK_NVME_PSDT_PRP = 0x0,
715 SPDK_NVME_PSDT_SGL_MPTR_CONTIG = 0x1,
716 SPDK_NVME_PSDT_SGL_MPTR_SGL = 0x2,
717 SPDK_NVME_PSDT_RESERVED = 0x3
718};
719
720/**
721 * Submission queue priority values for Create I/O Submission Queue Command.
722 *
723 * Only valid for weighted round robin arbitration method.
724 */
725enum spdk_nvme_qprio {
726 SPDK_NVME_QPRIO_URGENT = 0x0,
727 SPDK_NVME_QPRIO_HIGH = 0x1,
728 SPDK_NVME_QPRIO_MEDIUM = 0x2,
729 SPDK_NVME_QPRIO_LOW = 0x3
730};
731
732#define SPDK_NVME_CREATE_IO_SQ_QPRIO_MASK 0x3
733
734/**
735 * Optional Arbitration Mechanism Supported by the controller.
736 *
737 * Two bits for CAP.AMS (18:17) field are set to '1' when the controller supports.
738 * There is no bit for AMS_RR where all controllers support and set to 0x0 by default.
739 */
740enum spdk_nvme_cap_ams {
741 SPDK_NVME_CAP_AMS_WRR = 0x1, /**< weighted round robin */
742 SPDK_NVME_CAP_AMS_VS = 0x2, /**< vendor specific */
743};
744
745/**
746 * Arbitration Mechanism Selected to the controller.
747 *
748 * Value 0x2 to 0x6 is reserved.
749 */
750enum spdk_nvme_cc_ams {
751 SPDK_NVME_CC_AMS_RR = 0x0, /**< default round robin */
752 SPDK_NVME_CC_AMS_WRR = 0x1, /**< weighted round robin */
753 SPDK_NVME_CC_AMS_VS = 0x7, /**< vendor specific */
754};
755
756/**
757 * Fused Operation
758 */
759enum spdk_nvme_cmd_fuse {
760 SPDK_NVME_CMD_FUSE_NONE = 0x0, /**< normal operation */
761 SPDK_NVME_CMD_FUSE_FIRST = 0x1, /**< fused operation, first command */
762 SPDK_NVME_CMD_FUSE_SECOND = 0x2, /**< fused operation, second command */
763 SPDK_NVME_CMD_FUSE_MASK = 0x3, /**< fused operation flags mask */
764};
765
766/**
767 * Data used by Set Features/Get Features \ref SPDK_NVME_FEAT_ARBITRATION
768 */
769union spdk_nvme_feat_arbitration {
770 uint32_t raw;
771 struct {
772 /** Arbitration Burst */
773 uint32_t ab : 3;
774
775 uint32_t reserved : 5;
776
777 /** Low Priority Weight */
778 uint32_t lpw : 8;
779
780 /** Medium Priority Weight */
781 uint32_t mpw : 8;
782
783 /** High Priority Weight */
784 uint32_t hpw : 8;
785 } bits;
786};
787SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_feat_arbitration) == 4, "Incorrect size");
788
789#define SPDK_NVME_ARBITRATION_BURST_UNLIMITED 0x7
790
791/**
792 * Data used by Set Features/Get Features \ref SPDK_NVME_FEAT_POWER_MANAGEMENT
793 */
794union spdk_nvme_feat_power_management {
795 uint32_t raw;
796 struct {
797 /** Power State */
798 uint32_t ps : 5;
799
800 /** Workload Hint */
801 uint32_t wh : 3;
802
803 uint32_t reserved : 24;
804 } bits;
805};
806SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_feat_power_management) == 4, "Incorrect size");
807
808/**
809 * Data used by Set Features/Get Features \ref SPDK_NVME_FEAT_LBA_RANGE_TYPE
810 */
811union spdk_nvme_feat_lba_range_type {
812 uint32_t raw;
813 struct {
814 /** Number of LBA Ranges */
815 uint32_t num : 6;
816
817 uint32_t reserved : 26;
818 } bits;
819};
820SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_feat_lba_range_type) == 4, "Incorrect size");
821
822/**
823 * Data used by Set Features/Get Features \ref SPDK_NVME_FEAT_TEMPERATURE_THRESHOLD
824 */
825union spdk_nvme_feat_temperature_threshold {
826 uint32_t raw;
827 struct {
828 /** Temperature Threshold */
829 uint32_t tmpth : 16;
830
831 /** Threshold Temperature Select */
832 uint32_t tmpsel : 4;
833
834 /** Threshold Type Select */
835 uint32_t thsel : 2;
836
837 uint32_t reserved : 10;
838 } bits;
839};
840SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_feat_temperature_threshold) == 4, "Incorrect size");
841
842/**
843 * Data used by Set Features/Get Features \ref SPDK_NVME_FEAT_ERROR_RECOVERY
844 */
845union spdk_nvme_feat_error_recovery {
846 uint32_t raw;
847 struct {
848 /** Time Limited Error Recovery */
849 uint32_t tler : 16;
850
851 /** Deallocated or Unwritten Logical Block Error Enable */
852 uint32_t dulbe : 1;
853
854 uint32_t reserved : 15;
855 } bits;
856};
857SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_feat_error_recovery) == 4, "Incorrect size");
858
859/**
860 * Data used by Set Features/Get Features \ref SPDK_NVME_FEAT_VOLATILE_WRITE_CACHE
861 */
862union spdk_nvme_feat_volatile_write_cache {
863 uint32_t raw;
864 struct {
865 /** Volatile Write Cache Enable */
866 uint32_t wce : 1;
867
868 uint32_t reserved : 31;
869 } bits;
870};
871SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_feat_volatile_write_cache) == 4, "Incorrect size");
872
873/**
874 * Data used by Set Features/Get Features \ref SPDK_NVME_FEAT_NUMBER_OF_QUEUES
875 */
876union spdk_nvme_feat_number_of_queues {
877 uint32_t raw;
878 struct {
879 /** Number of I/O Submission Queues Requested */
880 uint32_t nsqr : 16;
881
882 /** Number of I/O Completion Queues Requested */
883 uint32_t ncqr : 16;
884 } bits;
885};
886SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_feat_number_of_queues) == 4, "Incorrect size");
887
888/**
889 * Data used by Set Features/Get Features \ref SPDK_NVME_FEAT_INTERRUPT_COALESCING
890 */
891union spdk_nvme_feat_interrupt_coalescing {
892 uint32_t raw;
893 struct {
894 /** Aggregation Threshold */
895 uint32_t thr : 8;
896
897 /** Aggregation time */
898 uint32_t time : 8;
899
900 uint32_t reserved : 16;
901 } bits;
902};
903SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_feat_interrupt_coalescing) == 4, "Incorrect size");
904
905/**
906 * Data used by Set Features/Get Features \ref SPDK_NVME_FEAT_INTERRUPT_VECTOR_CONFIGURATION
907 */
908union spdk_nvme_feat_interrupt_vector_configuration {
909 uint32_t raw;
910 struct {
911 /** Interrupt Vector */
912 uint32_t iv : 16;
913
914 /** Coalescing Disable */
915 uint32_t cd : 1;
916
917 uint32_t reserved : 15;
918 } bits;
919};
920SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_feat_interrupt_vector_configuration) == 4,
921 "Incorrect size");
922
923/**
924 * Data used by Set Features/Get Features \ref SPDK_NVME_FEAT_WRITE_ATOMICITY
925 */
926union spdk_nvme_feat_write_atomicity {
927 uint32_t raw;
928 struct {
929 /** Disable Normal */
930 uint32_t dn : 1;
931
932 uint32_t reserved : 31;
933 } bits;
934};
935SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_feat_write_atomicity) == 4, "Incorrect size");
936
937union spdk_nvme_critical_warning_state {
938 uint8_t raw;
939
940 struct {
941 uint8_t available_spare : 1;
942 uint8_t temperature : 1;
943 uint8_t device_reliability : 1;
944 uint8_t read_only : 1;
945 uint8_t volatile_memory_backup : 1;
946 uint8_t reserved : 3;
947 } bits;
948};
949SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_critical_warning_state) == 1, "Incorrect size");
950
951/**
952 * Data used by Set Features / Get Features \ref SPDK_NVME_FEAT_ASYNC_EVENT_CONFIGURATION
953 */
954union spdk_nvme_feat_async_event_configuration {
955 uint32_t raw;
956 struct {
957 union spdk_nvme_critical_warning_state crit_warn;
958 uint8_t ns_attr_notice : 1;
959 uint8_t fw_activation_notice : 1;
960 uint8_t telemetry_log_notice : 1;
961 uint8_t ana_change_notice : 1;
962 uint8_t reserved1 : 4;
963 uint16_t reserved2 : 15;
964 /** Discovery log change (refer to the NVMe over Fabrics specification) */
965 uint16_t discovery_log_change_notice : 1;
966 } bits;
967};
968SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_feat_async_event_configuration) == 4, "Incorrect size");
969
970/**
971 * Data used by Set Features/Get Features \ref SPDK_NVME_FEAT_AUTONOMOUS_POWER_STATE_TRANSITION
972 */
973union spdk_nvme_feat_autonomous_power_state_transition {

978

980 } bits;
981};

983 "Incorrect size");
984
985/**
986 * Data used by Set Features/Get Features \ref SPDK_NVME_FEAT_HOST_MEM_BUFFER

993
994 /** Memory Return */
995 uint32_t mr : 1;
996
997 uint32_t reserved : 30;
998 } bits;
999};
1000SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_feat_host_mem_buffer) == 4, "Incorrect size");
1001
1002/**
1003 * Data used by Set Features/Get Features \ref SPDK_NVME_FEAT_KEEP_ALIVE_TIMER
1004 */
1005union spdk_nvme_feat_keep_alive_timer {

1010 } bits;

1025 } bits;
1026};

1028 "Incorrect size");
1029

1032 */

1038

1040 } bits;
1041};

1043 "Incorrect size");
1044
1045/**

1047 */
1048union spdk_nvme_feat_software_progress_marker {

1053

1055 } bits;
1056};
1057SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_feat_software_progress_marker) == 4, "Incorrect size");
1058
1059/**
1060 * Data used by Set Features/Get Features \ref SPDK_NVME_FEAT_HOST_IDENTIFIER
1061 */
1062union spdk_nvme_feat_host_identifier {

1070};

1072
1073/**
1074 * Data used by Set Features/Get Features \ref SPDK_NVME_FEAT_HOST_RESERVE_MASK
1075 */
1076union spdk_nvme_feat_reservation_notification_mask {
1077 uint32_t raw;
1078 struct {
1079 uint32_t reserved1 : 1;
1080 /* Mask Registration Preempted Notification */
1081 uint32_t regpre : 1;
1082 /* Mask Reservation Released Notification */
1083 uint32_t resrel : 1;
1084 /* Mask Reservation Preempted Notification */
1085 uint32_t respre : 1;
1086 uint32_t reserved2 : 28;
1087 } bits;
1088};
1089SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_feat_reservation_notification_mask) == 4,
1090 "Incorrect size");
1091
1092/**
1093 * Data used by Set Features/Get Features \ref SPDK_NVME_FEAT_HOST_RESERVE_PERSIST
1094 */
1095union spdk_nvme_feat_reservation_persistence {
1096 uint32_t raw;
1097 struct {
1098 /* Persist Through Power Loss */
1099 uint32_t ptpl : 1;
1100 uint32_t reserved : 31;
1101 } bits;
1102};
1103SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_feat_reservation_persistence) == 4, "Incorrect size");
1104
1105/**
1106 * Data used by Set Features/Get Features \ref SPDK_NVME_FEAT_FDP
1107 */
1108union spdk_nvme_feat_fdp_cdw11 {
1109 uint32_t raw;
1110 struct {
1111 /* Endurance Group Identifier */
1112 uint32_t endgid : 16;
1113 uint32_t reserved : 16;
1114 } bits;
1115};
1116SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_feat_fdp_cdw11) == 4, "Incorrect size");
1117
1118/**
1119 * Data used by Set Features/Get Features \ref SPDK_NVME_FEAT_FDP
1120 */
1121union spdk_nvme_feat_fdp_cdw12 {
1122 uint32_t raw;
1123 struct {
1124 /* Flexible Data Placement Enable */
1125 uint32_t fdpe : 1;
1126 uint32_t reserved1 : 7;
1127 /* Flexible Data Placement Configuration Index */
1128 uint32_t fdpci : 8;
1129 uint32_t reserved2 : 16;
1130 } bits;
1131};
1132SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_feat_fdp_cdw12) == 4, "Incorrect size");
1133
1134/**
1135 * Data used by Set Features/Get Features \ref SPDK_NVME_FEAT_FDP_EVENTS
1136 */
1137union spdk_nvme_feat_fdp_events_cdw11 {
1138 uint32_t raw;
1139 struct {
1140 /* Placement Handle associated with RUH */
1141 uint32_t phndl : 16;
1142 /* Number of FDP event types in data buffer */
1143 uint32_t noet : 8;
1144 uint32_t reserved : 8;
1145 } bits;
1146};
1147SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_feat_fdp_events_cdw11) == 4, "Incorrect size");
1148
1149/**
1150 * Data used by Set Feature \ref SPDK_NVME_FEAT_FDP_EVENTS
1151 */
1152union spdk_nvme_feat_fdp_events_cdw12 {
1153 uint32_t raw;
1154 struct {
1155 /* FDP Event Enable */
1156 uint32_t fdpee : 1;
1157 uint32_t reserved1 : 31;
1158 } bits;
1159};
1160SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_feat_fdp_events_cdw12) == 4, "Incorrect size");
1161
1162union spdk_nvme_cmd_cdw10 {
1163 uint32_t raw;
1164 struct {
1165 /* Controller or Namespace Structure */
1166 uint32_t cns : 8;
1167 uint32_t reserved : 8;
1168 /* Controller Identifier */
1169 uint32_t cntid : 16;
1170 } identify;
1171
1172 struct {
1173 /* Log Page Identifier */
1174 uint32_t lid : 8;
1175 /* Log Specific Field */
1176 uint32_t lsp : 7;
1177 /* Retain Asynchronous Event */
1178 uint32_t rae : 1;
1179 /* Number of Dwords Lower */
1180 uint32_t numdl : 16;
1181 } get_log_page;
1182
1183 struct {
1184 /* Submission Queue Identifier */
1185 uint32_t sqid : 16;
1186 /* Command Identifier */
1187 uint32_t cid : 16;
1188 } abort;
1189
1190 struct {
1191 /* NVMe Security Specific Field */
1192 uint32_t nssf : 8;
1193 /* SP Specific 0 */
1194 uint32_t spsp0 : 8;
1195 /* SP Specific 1 */
1196 uint32_t spsp1 : 8;
1197 /* Security Protocol */
1198 uint32_t secp : 8;
1199 } sec_send_recv;
1200
1201 struct {
1202 /* Queue Identifier */
1203 uint32_t qid : 16;
1204 /* Queue Size */
1205 uint32_t qsize : 16;
1206 } create_io_q;
1207
1208 struct {
1209 /* Queue Identifier */
1210 uint32_t qid : 16;
1211 uint32_t reserved : 16;
1212 } delete_io_q;
1213
1214 struct {
1215 /* Feature Identifier */
1216 uint32_t fid : 8;
1217 /* Select */
1218 uint32_t sel : 3;
1219 uint32_t reserved : 21;
1220 } get_features;
1221
1222 struct {
1223 /* Feature Identifier */
1224 uint32_t fid : 8;
1225 uint32_t reserved : 23;
1226 /* Save */
1227 uint32_t sv : 1;
1228 } set_features;
1229
1230 struct {
1231 /* Select */
1232 uint32_t sel : 4;
1233 uint32_t reserved : 28;
1234 } ns_attach;
1235
1236 struct {
1237 /* Select */
1238 uint32_t sel : 4;
1239 uint32_t reserved : 28;
1240 } ns_manage;
1241
1242 struct {
1243 /* Number of Ranges */
1244 uint32_t nr : 8;
1245 uint32_t reserved : 24;
1246 } dsm;
1247
1248 struct {
1249 /* Reservation Register Action */
1250 uint32_t rrega : 3;
1251 /* Ignore Existing Key */
1252 uint32_t iekey : 1;
1253 uint32_t reserved : 26;
1254 /* Change Persist Through Power Loss State */
1255 uint32_t cptpl : 2;
1256 } resv_register;
1257
1258 struct {
1259 /* Reservation Release Action */
1260 uint32_t rrela : 3;
1261 /* Ignore Existing Key */
1262 uint32_t iekey : 1;
1263 uint32_t reserved1 : 4;
1264 /* Reservation Type */
1265 uint32_t rtype : 8;
1266 uint32_t reserved2 : 16;
1267 } resv_release;
1268
1269 struct {
1270 /* Reservation Acquire Action */
1271 uint32_t racqa : 3;
1272 /* Ignore Existing Key */
1273 uint32_t iekey : 1;
1274 uint32_t reserved1 : 4;
1275 /* Reservation Type */
1276 uint32_t rtype : 8;
1277 uint32_t reserved2 : 16;
1278 } resv_acquire;
1279
1280 struct {
1281 /* Management Operation */
1282 uint32_t mo : 8;
1283 uint32_t reserved : 8;
1284 /* Management Operation Specific */
1285 uint32_t mos : 16;
1286 } mgmt_send_recv;
1287
1288 struct {
1289 /* Value Size (Store) or Host Buffer Size (Retrieve/List) */
1290 uint32_t vsize : 32;
1291 } kv;
1292};
1293SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_cmd_cdw10) == 4, "Incorrect size");
1294
1295union spdk_nvme_cmd_cdw11 {
1296 uint32_t raw;
1297
1298 struct {
1299 /* NVM Set Identifier */
1300 uint32_t nvmsetid : 16;
1301 uint32_t reserved : 8;
1302 /* Command Set Identifier */
1303 uint32_t csi : 8;
1304 } identify;
1305
1306 struct {
1307 /* Physically Contiguous */
1308 uint32_t pc : 1;
1309 /* Queue Priority */
1310 uint32_t qprio : 2;
1311 uint32_t reserved : 13;
1312 /* Completion Queue Identifier */
1313 uint32_t cqid : 16;
1314 } create_io_sq;
1315
1316 struct {
1317 /* Physically Contiguous */
1318 uint32_t pc : 1;
1319 /* Interrupts Enabled */
1320 uint32_t ien : 1;
1321 uint32_t reserved : 14;
1322 /* Interrupt Vector */
1323 uint32_t iv : 16;
1324 } create_io_cq;
1325
1326 struct {
1327 /* Directive Operation */
1328 uint32_t doper : 8;
1329 /* Directive Type */
1330 uint32_t dtype : 8;
1331 /* Directive Specific */
1332 uint32_t dspec : 16;
1333 } directive;
1334
1335 struct {
1336 /* Number of Dwords */
1337 uint32_t numdu : 16;
1338 /* Log Specific Identifier */
1339 uint32_t lsid : 16;
1340 } get_log_page;
1341
1342 struct {
1343 /* Extended Data Structure */
1344 uint32_t eds : 1;
1345 uint32_t reserved : 31;
1346 } resv_report;
1347
1348 union spdk_nvme_feat_arbitration feat_arbitration;
1349 union spdk_nvme_feat_power_management feat_power_management;
1350 union spdk_nvme_feat_lba_range_type feat_lba_range_type;
1351 union spdk_nvme_feat_temperature_threshold feat_temp_threshold;
1352 union spdk_nvme_feat_error_recovery feat_error_recovery;
1353 union spdk_nvme_feat_volatile_write_cache feat_volatile_write_cache;
1354 union spdk_nvme_feat_number_of_queues feat_num_of_queues;
1355 union spdk_nvme_feat_interrupt_coalescing feat_interrupt_coalescing;
1356 union spdk_nvme_feat_interrupt_vector_configuration feat_interrupt_vector_configuration;
1357 union spdk_nvme_feat_write_atomicity feat_write_atomicity;
1358 union spdk_nvme_feat_async_event_configuration feat_async_event_cfg;
1359 union spdk_nvme_feat_keep_alive_timer feat_keep_alive_timer;
1360 union spdk_nvme_feat_host_identifier feat_host_identifier;
1361 union spdk_nvme_feat_reservation_notification_mask feat_rsv_notification_mask;
1362 union spdk_nvme_feat_reservation_persistence feat_rsv_persistence;
1363 union spdk_nvme_feat_fdp_cdw11 feat_fdp_cdw11;
1364 union spdk_nvme_feat_fdp_events_cdw11 feat_fdp_events_cdw11;
1365
1366 struct {
1367 /* Attribute – Integral Dataset for Read */
1368 uint32_t idr : 1;
1369 /* Attribute – Integral Dataset for Write */
1370 uint32_t idw : 1;
1371 /* Attribute – Deallocate */
1372 uint32_t ad : 1;
1373 uint32_t reserved : 29;
1374 } dsm;
1375
1376 struct {
1377 /* Key Length */
1378 uint32_t kl : 8;
1379 /* Request Options */
1380 uint32_t ro : 8;
1381 uint32_t reserved : 16;
1382 } kv;
1383};
1384SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_cmd_cdw11) == 4, "Incorrect size");
1385
1386union spdk_nvme_cmd_cdw12 {
1387 uint32_t raw;
1388
1389 struct {
1390 /* Number of Ranges */
1391 uint32_t nlb : 16;
1392 uint32_t reserved : 4;
1393 /* Directive Type */
1394 uint32_t dtype : 4;
1395 /* Storage Tag Check */
1396 uint32_t stc : 1;
1397 uint32_t reserved2 : 1;
1398 /* Protection Information Check */
1399 uint32_t prchk : 3;
1400 /* Protection Information Action */
1401 uint32_t pract : 1;
1402 /* Force Unit Access */
1403 uint32_t fua : 1;
1404 /* Limited Retry */
1405 uint32_t lr : 1;
1406 } write;
1407
1408 struct {
1409 /* Number of Ranges */
1410 uint32_t nr : 8;
1411 /* Descriptor Format */
1412 uint32_t df : 4;
1413 /* Protection Information Field Read */
1414 uint32_t prinfor : 4;
1415 uint32_t reserved : 4;
1416 /* Directive Type */
1417 uint32_t dtype : 4;
1418 /* Storage Tag Check Write */
1419 uint32_t stcw : 1;
1420 uint32_t reserved2 : 1;
1421 /* Protection Information Field Write */
1422 uint32_t prinfow : 4;
1423 /* Force Unit Access */
1424 uint32_t fua : 1;
1425 /* Limited Retry */
1426 uint32_t lr : 1;
1427 } copy;
1428
1429 struct {
1430 /* Number of Logical Blocks */
1431 uint32_t nlb : 16;
1432 uint32_t reserved : 8;
1433 /* Storage Tag Check */
1434 uint32_t stc : 1;
1435 /* Deallocate */
1436 uint32_t deac : 1;
1437 /* Protection Information Check */
1438 uint32_t prchk : 3;
1439 /* Protection Information Action */
1440 uint32_t pract : 1;
1441 /* Force Unit Access */
1442 uint32_t fua : 1;
1443 /* Limited Retry */
1444 uint32_t lr : 1;
1445 } write_zeroes;
1446
1447 union spdk_nvme_feat_fdp_cdw12 feat_fdp_cdw12;
1448 union spdk_nvme_feat_fdp_events_cdw12 feat_fdp_events_cdw12;
1449};
1450SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_cmd_cdw12) == 4, "Incorrect size");
1451
1452union spdk_nvme_cmd_cdw13 {
1453 uint32_t raw;
1454
1455 struct {
1456 /* Dataset Management */
1457 uint32_t dsm : 8;
1458 uint32_t reserved : 8;
1459 /* Directive Specific */
1460 uint32_t dspec : 16;
1461 } write;
1462};
1463SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_cmd_cdw13) == 4, "Incorrect size");
1464
1465struct spdk_nvme_cmd {
1466 /* dword 0 */
1467 uint16_t opc : 8; /* opcode */
1468 uint16_t fuse : 2; /* fused operation */
1469 uint16_t rsvd1 : 4;
1470 uint16_t psdt : 2;
1471 uint16_t cid; /* command identifier */
1472
1473 /* dword 1 */
1474 uint32_t nsid; /* namespace identifier */
1475
1476 /* dword 2-3 */
1477 uint32_t rsvd2;
1478 uint32_t rsvd3;
1479
1480 /* dword 4-5 */
1481 uint64_t mptr; /* metadata pointer */
1482
1483 /* dword 6-9: data pointer */
1484 union {
1485 struct {
1486 uint64_t prp1; /* prp entry 1 */
1487 uint64_t prp2; /* prp entry 2 */
1488 } prp;
1489
1490 struct spdk_nvme_sgl_descriptor sgl1;
1491 } dptr;
1492
1493 /* command-specific */
1494 union {
1495 uint32_t cdw10;
1496 union spdk_nvme_cmd_cdw10 cdw10_bits;
1497 };
1498 /* command-specific */
1499 union {
1500 uint32_t cdw11;
1501 union spdk_nvme_cmd_cdw11 cdw11_bits;
1502 };
1503 /* command-specific */
1504 union {
1505 uint32_t cdw12;
1506 union spdk_nvme_cmd_cdw12 cdw12_bits;
1507 };
1508 /* command-specific */
1509 union {
1510 uint32_t cdw13;
1511 union spdk_nvme_cmd_cdw13 cdw13_bits;
1512 };
1513 /* dword 14-15 */
1514 uint32_t cdw14; /* command-specific */
1515 uint32_t cdw15; /* command-specific */
1516};
1517SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_cmd) == 64, "Incorrect size");
1518
1519struct spdk_nvme_status {
1520 uint16_t p : 1; /* phase tag */
1521 uint16_t sc : 8; /* status code */
1522 uint16_t sct : 3; /* status code type */
1523 uint16_t crd : 2; /* command retry delay */
1524 uint16_t m : 1; /* more */
1525 uint16_t dnr : 1; /* do not retry */
1526};
1527SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_status) == 2, "Incorrect size");
1528
1529/**
1530 * Completion queue entry
1531 */
1532struct spdk_nvme_cpl {
1533 /* dword 0 */
1534 uint32_t cdw0; /* command-specific */
1535
1536 /* dword 1 */
1537 uint32_t cdw1; /* command-specific */
1538
1539 /* dword 2 */
1540 uint16_t sqhd; /* submission queue head pointer */
1541 uint16_t sqid; /* submission queue identifier */
1542
1543 /* dword 3 */
1544 uint16_t cid; /* command identifier */
1545 union {
1546 uint16_t status_raw;
1547 struct spdk_nvme_status status;
1548 };
1549};
1550SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_cpl) == 16, "Incorrect size");
1551
1552/**
1553 * Dataset Management range
1554 */
1555struct spdk_nvme_dsm_range {
1556 union {
1557 struct {
1558 uint32_t af : 4; /**< access frequency */
1559 uint32_t al : 2; /**< access latency */
1560 uint32_t reserved0 : 2;
1561
1562 uint32_t sr : 1; /**< sequential read range */
1563 uint32_t sw : 1; /**< sequential write range */
1564 uint32_t wp : 1; /**< write prepare */
1565 uint32_t reserved1 : 13;
1566
1567 uint32_t access_size : 8; /**< command access size */
1568 } bits;
1569
1570 uint32_t raw;
1571 } attributes;
1572
1573 uint32_t length;
1574 uint64_t starting_lba;
1575};
1576SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_dsm_range) == 16, "Incorrect size");
1577
1578/**
1579 * Simple Copy Command source range
1580 */
1581struct spdk_nvme_scc_source_range {
1582 uint64_t reserved0;
1583 uint64_t slba;
1584 uint16_t nlb;
1585 uint16_t reserved18;
1586 uint32_t reserved20;
1587 uint32_t eilbrt;
1588 uint16_t elbat;
1589 uint16_t elbatm;
1590};
1591SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_scc_source_range) == 32, "Incorrect size");
1592
1593/**
1594 * Status code types
1595 */
1596enum spdk_nvme_status_code_type {
1597 SPDK_NVME_SCT_GENERIC = 0x0,
1598 SPDK_NVME_SCT_COMMAND_SPECIFIC = 0x1,
1599 SPDK_NVME_SCT_MEDIA_ERROR = 0x2,
1600 SPDK_NVME_SCT_PATH = 0x3,
1601 /* 0x4-0x6 - reserved */
1602 SPDK_NVME_SCT_VENDOR_SPECIFIC = 0x7,
1603};
1604
1605/**
1606 * Generic command status codes
1607 */
1608enum spdk_nvme_generic_command_status_code {
1609 SPDK_NVME_SC_SUCCESS = 0x00,
1610 SPDK_NVME_SC_INVALID_OPCODE = 0x01,
1611 SPDK_NVME_SC_INVALID_FIELD = 0x02,
1612 SPDK_NVME_SC_COMMAND_ID_CONFLICT = 0x03,
1613 SPDK_NVME_SC_DATA_TRANSFER_ERROR = 0x04,
1614 SPDK_NVME_SC_ABORTED_POWER_LOSS = 0x05,
1615 SPDK_NVME_SC_INTERNAL_DEVICE_ERROR = 0x06,
1616 SPDK_NVME_SC_ABORTED_BY_REQUEST = 0x07,
1617 SPDK_NVME_SC_ABORTED_SQ_DELETION = 0x08,
1618 SPDK_NVME_SC_ABORTED_FAILED_FUSED = 0x09,
1619 SPDK_NVME_SC_ABORTED_MISSING_FUSED = 0x0a,
1620 SPDK_NVME_SC_INVALID_NAMESPACE_OR_FORMAT = 0x0b,
1621 SPDK_NVME_SC_COMMAND_SEQUENCE_ERROR = 0x0c,
1622 SPDK_NVME_SC_INVALID_SGL_SEG_DESCRIPTOR = 0x0d,
1623 SPDK_NVME_SC_INVALID_NUM_SGL_DESCIRPTORS = 0x0e,
1624 SPDK_NVME_SC_DATA_SGL_LENGTH_INVALID = 0x0f,
1625 SPDK_NVME_SC_METADATA_SGL_LENGTH_INVALID = 0x10,
1626 SPDK_NVME_SC_SGL_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_INVALID = 0x11,
1627 SPDK_NVME_SC_INVALID_CONTROLLER_MEM_BUF = 0x12,
1628 SPDK_NVME_SC_INVALID_PRP_OFFSET = 0x13,
1629 SPDK_NVME_SC_ATOMIC_WRITE_UNIT_EXCEEDED = 0x14,
1630 SPDK_NVME_SC_OPERATION_DENIED = 0x15,
1631 SPDK_NVME_SC_INVALID_SGL_OFFSET = 0x16,
1632 /* 0x17 - reserved */
1633 SPDK_NVME_SC_HOSTID_INCONSISTENT_FORMAT = 0x18,
1634 SPDK_NVME_SC_KEEP_ALIVE_EXPIRED = 0x19,
1635 SPDK_NVME_SC_KEEP_ALIVE_INVALID = 0x1a,
1636 SPDK_NVME_SC_ABORTED_PREEMPT = 0x1b,
1637 SPDK_NVME_SC_SANITIZE_FAILED = 0x1c,
1638 SPDK_NVME_SC_SANITIZE_IN_PROGRESS = 0x1d,
1639 SPDK_NVME_SC_SGL_DATA_BLOCK_GRANULARITY_INVALID = 0x1e,
1640 SPDK_NVME_SC_COMMAND_INVALID_IN_CMB = 0x1f,
1641 SPDK_NVME_SC_COMMAND_NAMESPACE_IS_PROTECTED = 0x20,
1642 SPDK_NVME_SC_COMMAND_INTERRUPTED = 0x21,
1643 SPDK_NVME_SC_COMMAND_TRANSIENT_TRANSPORT_ERROR = 0x22,
1644 SPDK_NVME_SC_COMMAND_PROHIBITED_BY_LOCKDOWN = 0x23,
1645 SPDK_NVME_SC_ADMIN_COMMAND_MEDIA_NOT_READY = 0x24,
1646
1647 SPDK_NVME_SC_FDP_DISABLED = 0x29,
1648 SPDK_NVME_SC_INVALID_PLACEMENT_HANDLE_LIST = 0x2A,
1649
1650 SPDK_NVME_SC_LBA_OUT_OF_RANGE = 0x80,
1651 SPDK_NVME_SC_CAPACITY_EXCEEDED = 0x81,
1652 SPDK_NVME_SC_NAMESPACE_NOT_READY = 0x82,
1653 SPDK_NVME_SC_RESERVATION_CONFLICT = 0x83,
1654 SPDK_NVME_SC_FORMAT_IN_PROGRESS = 0x84,
1655 SPDK_NVME_SC_INVALID_VALUE_SIZE = 0x85,
1656 SPDK_NVME_SC_INVALID_KEY_SIZE = 0x86,
1657 SPDK_NVME_SC_KV_KEY_DOES_NOT_EXIST = 0x87,
1658 SPDK_NVME_SC_UNRECOVERED_ERROR = 0x88,
1659 SPDK_NVME_SC_KEY_EXISTS = 0x89,
1660};
1661
1662/**
1663 * Command specific status codes
1664 */
1665enum spdk_nvme_command_specific_status_code {
1666 SPDK_NVME_SC_COMPLETION_QUEUE_INVALID = 0x00,
1667 SPDK_NVME_SC_INVALID_QUEUE_IDENTIFIER = 0x01,
1668 SPDK_NVME_SC_INVALID_QUEUE_SIZE = 0x02,
1669 SPDK_NVME_SC_ABORT_COMMAND_LIMIT_EXCEEDED = 0x03,
1670 /* 0x04 - reserved */
1671 SPDK_NVME_SC_ASYNC_EVENT_REQUEST_LIMIT_EXCEEDED = 0x05,
1672 SPDK_NVME_SC_INVALID_FIRMWARE_SLOT = 0x06,
1673 SPDK_NVME_SC_INVALID_FIRMWARE_IMAGE = 0x07,
1674 SPDK_NVME_SC_INVALID_INTERRUPT_VECTOR = 0x08,
1675 SPDK_NVME_SC_INVALID_LOG_PAGE = 0x09,
1676 SPDK_NVME_SC_INVALID_FORMAT = 0x0a,
1677 SPDK_NVME_SC_FIRMWARE_REQ_CONVENTIONAL_RESET = 0x0b,
1678 SPDK_NVME_SC_INVALID_QUEUE_DELETION = 0x0c,
1679 SPDK_NVME_SC_FEATURE_ID_NOT_SAVEABLE = 0x0d,
1680 SPDK_NVME_SC_FEATURE_NOT_CHANGEABLE = 0x0e,
1681 SPDK_NVME_SC_FEATURE_NOT_NAMESPACE_SPECIFIC = 0x0f,
1682 SPDK_NVME_SC_FIRMWARE_REQ_NVM_RESET = 0x10,
1683 SPDK_NVME_SC_FIRMWARE_REQ_RESET = 0x11,
1684 SPDK_NVME_SC_FIRMWARE_REQ_MAX_TIME_VIOLATION = 0x12,
1685 SPDK_NVME_SC_FIRMWARE_ACTIVATION_PROHIBITED = 0x13,
1686 SPDK_NVME_SC_OVERLAPPING_RANGE = 0x14,
1687 SPDK_NVME_SC_NAMESPACE_INSUFFICIENT_CAPACITY = 0x15,
1688 SPDK_NVME_SC_NAMESPACE_ID_UNAVAILABLE = 0x16,
1689 /* 0x17 - reserved */
1690 SPDK_NVME_SC_NAMESPACE_ALREADY_ATTACHED = 0x18,
1691 SPDK_NVME_SC_NAMESPACE_IS_PRIVATE = 0x19,
1692 SPDK_NVME_SC_NAMESPACE_NOT_ATTACHED = 0x1a,
1693 SPDK_NVME_SC_THINPROVISIONING_NOT_SUPPORTED = 0x1b,
1694 SPDK_NVME_SC_CONTROLLER_LIST_INVALID = 0x1c,
1695 SPDK_NVME_SC_DEVICE_SELF_TEST_IN_PROGRESS = 0x1d,
1696 SPDK_NVME_SC_BOOT_PARTITION_WRITE_PROHIBITED = 0x1e,
1697 SPDK_NVME_SC_INVALID_CTRLR_ID = 0x1f,
1698 SPDK_NVME_SC_INVALID_SECONDARY_CTRLR_STATE = 0x20,
1699 SPDK_NVME_SC_INVALID_NUM_CTRLR_RESOURCES = 0x21,
1700 SPDK_NVME_SC_INVALID_RESOURCE_ID = 0x22,
1701 SPDK_NVME_SC_SANITIZE_PROHIBITED = 0x23,
1702 SPDK_NVME_SC_ANA_GROUP_IDENTIFIER_INVALID = 0x24,
1703 SPDK_NVME_SC_ANA_ATTACH_FAILED = 0x25,
1704 SPDK_NVME_SC_INSUFFICIENT_CAPACITY = 0x26,
1705 SPDK_NVME_SC_NAMESPACE_ATTACH_LIMIT_EXCEEDED = 0x27,
1706 SPDK_NVME_SC_PROHIBIT_CMD_EXEC_NOT_SUPPORTED = 0x28,
1707 SPDK_NVME_SC_IOCS_NOT_SUPPORTED = 0x29,
1708 SPDK_NVME_SC_IOCS_NOT_ENABLED = 0x2a,
1709 SPDK_NVME_SC_IOCS_COMBINATION_REJECTED = 0x2b,
1710 SPDK_NVME_SC_INVALID_IOCS = 0x2c,
1711 SPDK_NVME_SC_IDENTIFIER_UNAVAILABLE = 0x2d,
1712
1713 SPDK_NVME_SC_STREAM_RESOURCE_ALLOCATION_FAILED = 0x7f,
1714 SPDK_NVME_SC_CONFLICTING_ATTRIBUTES = 0x80,
1715 SPDK_NVME_SC_INVALID_PROTECTION_INFO = 0x81,
1716 SPDK_NVME_SC_ATTEMPTED_WRITE_TO_RO_RANGE = 0x82,
1717 SPDK_NVME_SC_CMD_SIZE_LIMIT_SIZE_EXCEEDED = 0x83,
1718
1719 SPDK_NVME_SC_ZONED_BOUNDARY_ERROR = 0xb8,
1720 SPDK_NVME_SC_ZONE_IS_FULL = 0xb9,
1721 SPDK_NVME_SC_ZONE_IS_READ_ONLY = 0xba,
1722 SPDK_NVME_SC_ZONE_IS_OFFLINE = 0xbb,
1723 SPDK_NVME_SC_ZONE_INVALID_WRITE = 0xbc,
1724 SPDK_NVME_SC_TOO_MANY_ACTIVE_ZONES = 0xbd,
1725 SPDK_NVME_SC_TOO_MANY_OPEN_ZONES = 0xbe,
1726 SPDK_NVME_SC_INVALID_ZONE_STATE_TRANSITION = 0xbf,
1727};
1728
1729/**
1730 * Media error status codes
1731 */
1732enum spdk_nvme_media_error_status_code {
1733 SPDK_NVME_SC_WRITE_FAULTS = 0x80,
1734 SPDK_NVME_SC_UNRECOVERED_READ_ERROR = 0x81,
1735 SPDK_NVME_SC_GUARD_CHECK_ERROR = 0x82,
1736 SPDK_NVME_SC_APPLICATION_TAG_CHECK_ERROR = 0x83,
1737 SPDK_NVME_SC_REFERENCE_TAG_CHECK_ERROR = 0x84,
1738 SPDK_NVME_SC_COMPARE_FAILURE = 0x85,
1739 SPDK_NVME_SC_ACCESS_DENIED = 0x86,
1740 SPDK_NVME_SC_DEALLOCATED_OR_UNWRITTEN_BLOCK = 0x87,
1741 SPDK_NVME_SC_END_TO_END_STORAGE_TAG_CHECK_ERROR = 0x88,
1742};
1743
1744/**
1745 * Path related status codes
1746 */
1747enum spdk_nvme_path_status_code {
1748 SPDK_NVME_SC_INTERNAL_PATH_ERROR = 0x00,
1749 SPDK_NVME_SC_ASYMMETRIC_ACCESS_PERSISTENT_LOSS = 0x01,
1750 SPDK_NVME_SC_ASYMMETRIC_ACCESS_INACCESSIBLE = 0x02,
1751 SPDK_NVME_SC_ASYMMETRIC_ACCESS_TRANSITION = 0x03,
1752
1753 SPDK_NVME_SC_CONTROLLER_PATH_ERROR = 0x60,
1754
1755 SPDK_NVME_SC_HOST_PATH_ERROR = 0x70,
1756 SPDK_NVME_SC_ABORTED_BY_HOST = 0x71,
1757};
1758
1759#define SPDK_NVME_MAX_OPC 0xff
1760
1761/**
1762 * Admin opcodes
1763 */
1764enum spdk_nvme_admin_opcode {
1765 SPDK_NVME_OPC_DELETE_IO_SQ = 0x00,
1766 SPDK_NVME_OPC_CREATE_IO_SQ = 0x01,
1767 SPDK_NVME_OPC_GET_LOG_PAGE = 0x02,
1768 /* 0x03 - reserved */
1769 SPDK_NVME_OPC_DELETE_IO_CQ = 0x04,
1770 SPDK_NVME_OPC_CREATE_IO_CQ = 0x05,
1771 SPDK_NVME_OPC_IDENTIFY = 0x06,
1772 /* 0x07 - reserved */
1773 SPDK_NVME_OPC_ABORT = 0x08,
1774 SPDK_NVME_OPC_SET_FEATURES = 0x09,
1775 SPDK_NVME_OPC_GET_FEATURES = 0x0a,
1776 /* 0x0b - reserved */
1777 SPDK_NVME_OPC_ASYNC_EVENT_REQUEST = 0x0c,
1778 SPDK_NVME_OPC_NS_MANAGEMENT = 0x0d,
1779 /* 0x0e-0x0f - reserved */
1780 SPDK_NVME_OPC_FIRMWARE_COMMIT = 0x10,
1781 SPDK_NVME_OPC_FIRMWARE_IMAGE_DOWNLOAD = 0x11,
1782
1783 SPDK_NVME_OPC_DEVICE_SELF_TEST = 0x14,
1784 SPDK_NVME_OPC_NS_ATTACHMENT = 0x15,
1785
1786 SPDK_NVME_OPC_KEEP_ALIVE = 0x18,
1787 SPDK_NVME_OPC_DIRECTIVE_SEND = 0x19,
1788 SPDK_NVME_OPC_DIRECTIVE_RECEIVE = 0x1a,
1789
1790 SPDK_NVME_OPC_VIRTUALIZATION_MANAGEMENT = 0x1c,
1791 SPDK_NVME_OPC_NVME_MI_SEND = 0x1d,
1792 SPDK_NVME_OPC_NVME_MI_RECEIVE = 0x1e,
1793
1794 SPDK_NVME_OPC_DOORBELL_BUFFER_CONFIG = 0x7c,
1795
1796 SPDK_NVME_OPC_FORMAT_NVM = 0x80,
1797 SPDK_NVME_OPC_SECURITY_SEND = 0x81,
1798 SPDK_NVME_OPC_SECURITY_RECEIVE = 0x82,
1799
1800 SPDK_NVME_OPC_SANITIZE = 0x84,
1801
1802 SPDK_NVME_OPC_GET_LBA_STATUS = 0x86,
1803 SPDK_NVME_OPC_VENDOR_SPECIFIC_START = 0xC0,
1804};
1805
1806/**
1807 * NVM command set opcodes
1808 */
1809enum spdk_nvme_nvm_opcode {
1810 SPDK_NVME_OPC_FLUSH = 0x00,
1811 SPDK_NVME_OPC_WRITE = 0x01,
1812 SPDK_NVME_OPC_READ = 0x02,
1813 /* 0x03 - reserved */
1814 SPDK_NVME_OPC_WRITE_UNCORRECTABLE = 0x04,
1815 SPDK_NVME_OPC_COMPARE = 0x05,
1816 /* 0x06-0x07 - reserved */
1817 SPDK_NVME_OPC_WRITE_ZEROES = 0x08,
1818 SPDK_NVME_OPC_DATASET_MANAGEMENT = 0x09,
1819
1820 SPDK_NVME_OPC_VERIFY = 0x0c,
1821 SPDK_NVME_OPC_RESERVATION_REGISTER = 0x0d,
1822 SPDK_NVME_OPC_RESERVATION_REPORT = 0x0e,
1823
1824 SPDK_NVME_OPC_RESERVATION_ACQUIRE = 0x11,
1825 SPDK_NVME_OPC_IO_MANAGEMENT_RECEIVE = 0x12,
1826 SPDK_NVME_OPC_RESERVATION_RELEASE = 0x15,
1827
1828 SPDK_NVME_OPC_COPY = 0x19,
1829 SPDK_NVME_OPC_IO_MANAGEMENT_SEND = 0x1D,
1830};
1831
1832/**
1833 * Zoned Namespace command set opcodes
1834 *
1835 * In addition to the opcodes of the NVM command set, the Zoned Namespace
1836 * command set supports the following opcodes.
1837 */
1838enum spdk_nvme_zns_opcode {
1839 SPDK_NVME_OPC_ZONE_MGMT_SEND = 0x79,
1840 SPDK_NVME_OPC_ZONE_MGMT_RECV = 0x7a,
1841 SPDK_NVME_OPC_ZONE_APPEND = 0x7d,
1842};
1843
1844/**
1845 * Key-Value command set opcodes
1846 *
1847 * The Key-Value command set supports the following opcodes.
1848 */
1849enum spdk_nvme_kv_opcode {
1850 SPDK_NVME_OPC_KV_STORE = 0x01,
1851 SPDK_NVME_OPC_KV_RETRIEVE = 0x02,
1852 SPDK_NVME_OPC_KV_LIST = 0x06,
1853 SPDK_NVME_OPC_KV_DELETE = 0x10,
1854 SPDK_NVME_OPC_KV_EXIST = 0x14,
1855};
1856
1857/**
1858 * Key-Value Store command request options
1859 */
1860enum spdk_nvme_kv_store_option {
1861 SPDK_NVME_KV_STORE_OPT_DONT_STORE_IF_KEY_NOT_EXISTS = 1 << 0,
1862 SPDK_NVME_KV_STORE_OPT_DONT_STORE_IF_KEY_EXISTS = 1 << 1,
1863 SPDK_NVME_KV_STORE_OPT_COMPRESS = 1 << 2,
1864};
1865
1866/**
1867 * Key-Value Retrieve command request options
1868 */
1869enum spdk_nvme_kv_retrieve_option {
1870 SPDK_NVME_KV_RETRIEVE_OPT_RETRIEVE_RAW = 1 << 0,
1871};
1872
1873/**
1874 * Data transfer (bits 1:0) of an NVMe opcode.
1875 *
1876 * \sa spdk_nvme_opc_get_data_transfer
1877 */
1878enum spdk_nvme_data_transfer {
1879 /** Opcode does not transfer data */
1880 SPDK_NVME_DATA_NONE = 0,
1881 /** Opcode transfers data from host to controller (e.g. Write) */
1882 SPDK_NVME_DATA_HOST_TO_CONTROLLER = 1,
1883 /** Opcode transfers data from controller to host (e.g. Read) */
1884 SPDK_NVME_DATA_CONTROLLER_TO_HOST = 2,
1885 /** Opcode transfers data both directions */
1886 SPDK_NVME_DATA_BIDIRECTIONAL = 3
1887};
1888
1889/**
1890 * Extract the Data Transfer bits from an NVMe opcode.
1891 *
1892 * This determines whether a command requires a data buffer and
1893 * which direction (host to controller or controller to host) it is
1894 * transferred.
1895 */
1896static inline enum spdk_nvme_data_transfer spdk_nvme_opc_get_data_transfer(uint8_t opc)
1897{
1898 return (enum spdk_nvme_data_transfer)(opc & 3);
1899}
1900
1901static inline uint32_t
1902spdk_nvme_bytes_to_numd(uint32_t len)
1903{
1904 return (len >> 2) - 1;
1905}
1906
1907#pragma pack(push, 1)
1908struct spdk_nvme_host_behavior {
1909 uint8_t acre;
1910 uint8_t etdas;
1911 uint8_t lbafee;
1912 uint8_t reserved[509];
1913};
1914SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_host_behavior) == 512, "Incorrect size");
1915#pragma pack(pop)
1916
1917/**
1918 * Supported FDP event descriptor
1919 */
1920struct spdk_nvme_fdp_event_desc {
1921 /* FDP Event type */
1922 uint8_t fdp_etype;
1923
1924 /* FDP event type attributes */
1925 union {
1926 uint8_t raw;
1927 struct {
1928 /* FDP event enabled */
1929 uint8_t fdp_ee : 1;
1930 uint8_t reserved : 7;
1931 } bits;
1932 } fdpeta;
1933};
1934SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_fdp_event_desc) == 2, "Incorrect size");
1935
1936/**
1937 * Reclaim unit handle status descriptor
1938 */
1939struct spdk_nvme_fdp_ruhs_desc {
1940 /* Placement Identifier */
1941 uint16_t pid;
1942
1943 /* Reclaim Unit Handle Identifier */
1944 uint16_t ruhid;
1945
1946 /* Estimated Active Reclaim Unit Time Remaining */
1947 uint32_t earutr;
1948
1949 /* Reclaim Unit Available Media Writes */
1950 uint64_t ruamw;
1951
1952 uint8_t reserved[16];
1953};
1954SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_fdp_ruhs_desc) == 32, "Incorrect size");
1955
1956/**
1957 * Reclaim unit handle status
1958 */
1959struct spdk_nvme_fdp_ruhs {
1960 uint8_t reserved[14];
1961
1962 /* Number of Reclaim Unit Handle Status Descriptors */
1963 uint16_t nruhsd;
1964
1965 struct spdk_nvme_fdp_ruhs_desc ruhs_desc[];
1966};
1967SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_fdp_ruhs) == 16, "Incorrect size");
1968
1969/**
1970 * Management operation to perform for IO management receive
1971 */
1972enum spdk_nvme_fdp_mgmt_recv_mo {
1973 SPDK_NVME_FDP_IO_MGMT_RECV_NA = 0x00,
1974 SPDK_NVME_FDP_IO_MGMT_RECV_RUHS = 0x01,
1975 /* 0x02-0xFE - reserved */
1976 SPDK_NVME_FDP_IO_MGMT_RECV_VS = 0xFF,
1977};
1978
1979/**
1980 * Management operation to perform for IO management send
1981 */
1982enum spdk_nvme_fdp_mgmt_send_mo {
1983 SPDK_NVME_FDP_IO_MGMT_SEND_NA = 0x00,
1984 SPDK_NVME_FDP_IO_MGMT_SEND_RUHU = 0x01,
1985 /* 0x02-0xFE - reserved */
1986 SPDK_NVME_FDP_IO_MGMT_SEND_VS = 0xFF,
1987};
1988
1989enum spdk_nvme_feat {
1990 /* 0x00 - reserved */
1991
1992 /** cdw11 layout defined by \ref spdk_nvme_feat_arbitration */
1993 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_ARBITRATION = 0x01,
1994 /** cdw11 layout defined by \ref spdk_nvme_feat_power_management */
1995 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_POWER_MANAGEMENT = 0x02,
1996 /** cdw11 layout defined by \ref spdk_nvme_feat_lba_range_type */
1997 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_LBA_RANGE_TYPE = 0x03,
1998 /** cdw11 layout defined by \ref spdk_nvme_feat_temperature_threshold */
1999 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_TEMPERATURE_THRESHOLD = 0x04,
2000 /** cdw11 layout defined by \ref spdk_nvme_feat_error_recovery */
2001 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_ERROR_RECOVERY = 0x05,
2002 /** cdw11 layout defined by \ref spdk_nvme_feat_volatile_write_cache */
2003 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_VOLATILE_WRITE_CACHE = 0x06,
2004 /** cdw11 layout defined by \ref spdk_nvme_feat_number_of_queues */
2005 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_NUMBER_OF_QUEUES = 0x07,
2006 /** cdw11 layout defined by \ref spdk_nvme_feat_interrupt_coalescing */
2007 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_INTERRUPT_COALESCING = 0x08,
2008 /** cdw11 layout defined by \ref spdk_nvme_feat_interrupt_vector_configuration */
2009 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_INTERRUPT_VECTOR_CONFIGURATION = 0x09,
2010 /** cdw11 layout defined by \ref spdk_nvme_feat_write_atomicity */
2011 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_WRITE_ATOMICITY = 0x0A,
2012 /** cdw11 layout defined by \ref spdk_nvme_feat_async_event_configuration */
2013 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_ASYNC_EVENT_CONFIGURATION = 0x0B,
2014 /** cdw11 layout defined by \ref spdk_nvme_feat_autonomous_power_state_transition */
2015 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_AUTONOMOUS_POWER_STATE_TRANSITION = 0x0C,
2016 /** cdw11 layout defined by \ref spdk_nvme_feat_host_mem_buffer */
2017 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_HOST_MEM_BUFFER = 0x0D,
2018 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_TIMESTAMP = 0x0E,
2019 /** cdw11 layout defined by \ref spdk_nvme_feat_keep_alive_timer */
2020 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_KEEP_ALIVE_TIMER = 0x0F,
2021 /** cdw11 layout defined by \ref spdk_nvme_feat_host_controlled_thermal_management */
2022 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_HOST_CONTROLLED_THERMAL_MANAGEMENT = 0x10,
2023 /** cdw11 layout defined by \ref spdk_nvme_feat_non_operational_power_state_config */
2024 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_NON_OPERATIONAL_POWER_STATE_CONFIG = 0x11,
2025
2026 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_READ_RECOVERY_LEVEL_CONFIG = 0x12,
2027 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_PREDICTABLE_LATENCY_MODE_CONFIG = 0x13,
2028 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_PREDICTABLE_LATENCY_MODE_WINDOW = 0x14,
2029 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_LBA_STATUS_INFORMATION_ATTRIBUTES = 0x15,
2030 /** data buffer layout defined by \ref spdk_nvme_host_behavior */
2031 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_HOST_BEHAVIOR_SUPPORT = 0x16,
2032 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_SANITIZE_CONFIG = 0x17,
2033 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_ENDURANCE_GROUP_EVENT = 0x18,
2034 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_IO_COMMAND_SET_PROFILE = 0x19,
2035 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_SPINUP_CONTROL = 0x1A,
2036 /* 0x1B-0x1C - reserved */
2037
2038 /**
2039 * cdw11 layout defined by \ref spdk_nvme_feat_fdp_cdw11
2040 * cdw12 layout defined by \ref spdk_nvme_feat_fdp_cdw12
2041 */
2042 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_FDP = 0x1D,
2043
2044 /**
2045 * cdw11 layout defined by \ref spdk_nvme_feat_fdp_events_cdw11
2046 * cdw12 layout defined by \ref spdk_nvme_feat_fdp_events_cdw12
2047 * data layout defined by \ref spdk_nvme_fdp_event_desc
2048 */
2049 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_FDP_EVENTS = 0x1E,
2050
2051 /* 0x1F-0x77 - reserved */
2052 /* 0x78-0x7C - NVMe-MI features */
2053 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_ENHANCED_CONTROLLER_METADATA = 0x7D,
2054 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_CONTROLLER_METADATA = 0x7E,
2055 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_NAMESPACE_METADATA = 0x7F,
2056
2057 /** cdw11 layout defined by \ref spdk_nvme_feat_software_progress_marker */
2058 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_SOFTWARE_PROGRESS_MARKER = 0x80,
2059
2060 /** cdw11 layout defined by \ref spdk_nvme_feat_host_identifier */
2061 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_HOST_IDENTIFIER = 0x81,
2062 /** cdw11 layout defined by \ref spdk_nvme_feat_reservation_notification_mask */
2063 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_HOST_RESERVE_MASK = 0x82,
2064 /** cdw11 layout defined by \ref spdk_nvme_feat_reservation_persistence */
2065 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_HOST_RESERVE_PERSIST = 0x83,
2066 SPDK_NVME_FEAT_NAMESPACE_WRITE_PROTECTION_CONFIG = 0x84,
2067
2068 /* 0x85-0xBF - command set specific (reserved) */
2069
2070 /* 0xC0-0xFF - vendor specific */
2071};
2072
2073/** Bit set of attributes for DATASET MANAGEMENT commands. */
2074enum spdk_nvme_dsm_attribute {
2075 SPDK_NVME_DSM_ATTR_INTEGRAL_READ = 0x1,
2076 SPDK_NVME_DSM_ATTR_INTEGRAL_WRITE = 0x2,
2077 SPDK_NVME_DSM_ATTR_DEALLOCATE = 0x4,
2078};
2079
2080struct spdk_nvme_power_state {
2081 uint16_t mp; /* bits 15:00: maximum power */
2082
2083 uint8_t reserved1;
2084
2085 uint8_t mps : 1; /* bit 24: max power scale */
2086 uint8_t nops : 1; /* bit 25: non-operational state */
2087 uint8_t reserved2 : 6;
2088
2089 uint32_t enlat; /* bits 63:32: entry latency in microseconds */
2090 uint32_t exlat; /* bits 95:64: exit latency in microseconds */
2091
2092 uint8_t rrt : 5; /* bits 100:96: relative read throughput */
2093 uint8_t reserved3 : 3;
2094
2095 uint8_t rrl : 5; /* bits 108:104: relative read latency */
2096 uint8_t reserved4 : 3;
2097
2098 uint8_t rwt : 5; /* bits 116:112: relative write throughput */
2099 uint8_t reserved5 : 3;
2100
2101 uint8_t rwl : 5; /* bits 124:120: relative write latency */
2102 uint8_t reserved6 : 3;
2103
2104 uint16_t idlp; /* bits 143:128: idle power */
2105
2106 uint8_t reserved7 : 6;
2107 uint8_t ips : 2; /* bits 151:150: idle power scale */
2108
2109 uint8_t reserved8;
2110
2111 uint16_t actp; /* bits 175:160: active power */
2112
2113 uint8_t apw : 3; /* bits 178:176: active power workload */
2114 uint8_t reserved9 : 3;
2115 uint8_t aps : 2; /* bits 183:182: active power scale */
2116
2117 uint8_t reserved10[9];
2118};
2119SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_power_state) == 32, "Incorrect size");
2120
2121/** Identify command CNS value */
2122enum spdk_nvme_identify_cns {
2123 /** Identify namespace indicated in CDW1.NSID */
2124 SPDK_NVME_IDENTIFY_NS = 0x00,
2125
2126 /** Identify controller */
2127 SPDK_NVME_IDENTIFY_CTRLR = 0x01,
2128
2129 /** List active NSIDs greater than CDW1.NSID */
2130 SPDK_NVME_IDENTIFY_ACTIVE_NS_LIST = 0x02,
2131
2132 /** List namespace identification descriptors */
2133 SPDK_NVME_IDENTIFY_NS_ID_DESCRIPTOR_LIST = 0x03,
2134
2135 /** Identify namespace indicated in CDW1.NSID, specific to CDW11.CSI */
2136 SPDK_NVME_IDENTIFY_NS_IOCS = 0x05,
2137
2138 /** Identify controller, specific to CDW11.CSI */
2139 SPDK_NVME_IDENTIFY_CTRLR_IOCS = 0x06,
2140
2141 /** List active NSIDs greater than CDW1.NSID, specific to CDW11.CSI */
2142 SPDK_NVME_IDENTIFY_ACTIVE_NS_LIST_IOCS = 0x07,
2143
2144 /** I/O Command Set Independent Identify Namespace */
2145 SPDK_NVME_IDENTIFY_NS_IOCS_INDEPENDENT = 0x08,
2146
2147 /** List allocated NSIDs greater than CDW1.NSID */
2148 SPDK_NVME_IDENTIFY_ALLOCATED_NS_LIST = 0x10,
2149
2150 /** Identify namespace if CDW1.NSID is allocated */
2151 SPDK_NVME_IDENTIFY_NS_ALLOCATED = 0x11,
2152
2153 /** Get list of controllers starting at CDW10.CNTID that are attached to CDW1.NSID */
2154 SPDK_NVME_IDENTIFY_NS_ATTACHED_CTRLR_LIST = 0x12,
2155
2156 /** Get list of controllers starting at CDW10.CNTID */
2157 SPDK_NVME_IDENTIFY_CTRLR_LIST = 0x13,
2158
2159 /** Get primary controller capabilities structure */
2160 SPDK_NVME_IDENTIFY_PRIMARY_CTRLR_CAP = 0x14,
2161
2162 /** Get secondary controller list */
2163 SPDK_NVME_IDENTIFY_SECONDARY_CTRLR_LIST = 0x15,
2164
2165 /** Get UUID List */
2166 SPDK_NVME_IDENTIFY_UUID_LIST = 0x17,
2167
2168 /** List allocated NSIDs greater than CDW1.NSID, specific to CDW11.CSI */
2169 SPDK_NVME_IDENTIFY_ALLOCATED_NS_LIST_IOCS = 0x1a,
2170
2171 /** Identify namespace if CDW1.NSID is allocated, specific to CDWD11.CSI */
2172 SPDK_NVME_IDENTIFY_NS_ALLOCATED_IOCS = 0x1b,
2173
2174 /** Identify I/O Command Sets */
2175 SPDK_NVME_IDENTIFY_IOCS = 0x1c,
2176};
2177
2178/** NVMe over Fabrics controller model */
2179enum spdk_nvmf_ctrlr_model {
2180 /** NVM subsystem uses dynamic controller model */
2181 SPDK_NVMF_CTRLR_MODEL_DYNAMIC = 0,
2182
2183 /** NVM subsystem uses static controller model */
2184 SPDK_NVMF_CTRLR_MODEL_STATIC = 1,
2185};
2186
2187#define SPDK_NVME_CTRLR_SN_LEN 20
2188#define SPDK_NVME_CTRLR_MN_LEN 40
2189#define SPDK_NVME_CTRLR_FR_LEN 8
2190#define SPDK_NVME_CTRLR_MEGCAP_LEN 16
2191
2192/** Identify Controller data sgls.supported values */
2193enum spdk_nvme_sgls_supported {
2194 /** SGLs are not supported */
2195 SPDK_NVME_SGLS_NOT_SUPPORTED = 0,
2196
2197 /** SGLs are supported with no alignment or granularity requirement. */
2198 SPDK_NVME_SGLS_SUPPORTED = 1,
2199
2200 /** SGLs are supported with a DWORD alignment and granularity requirement. */
2201 SPDK_NVME_SGLS_SUPPORTED_DWORD_ALIGNED = 2,
2202};
2203
2204/** Identify Controller data vwc.flush_broadcast values */
2205enum spdk_nvme_flush_broadcast {
2206 /** Support for NSID=FFFFFFFFh with Flush is not indicated. */
2207 SPDK_NVME_FLUSH_BROADCAST_NOT_INDICATED = 0,
2208
2209 /* 01b: Reserved */
2210
2211 /** Flush does not support NSID set to FFFFFFFFh. */
2212 SPDK_NVME_FLUSH_BROADCAST_NOT_SUPPORTED = 2,
2213
2214 /** Flush supports NSID set to FFFFFFFFh. */
2215 SPDK_NVME_FLUSH_BROADCAST_SUPPORTED = 3
2216};
2217
2218#define SPDK_NVME_MAXDNA_FIELD_SIZE 16
2219#define SPDK_NVME_NQN_FIELD_SIZE 256
2220
2221/** Identify Controller data NVMe over Fabrics-specific fields */
2222struct spdk_nvme_cdata_nvmf_specific {
2223 /** I/O queue command capsule supported size (16-byte units) */
2224 uint32_t ioccsz;
2225
2226 /** I/O queue response capsule supported size (16-byte units) */
2227 uint32_t iorcsz;
2228
2229 /** In-capsule data offset (16-byte units) */
2230 uint16_t icdoff;
2231
2232 /** Controller attributes */
2233 struct {
2234 /** Controller model: \ref spdk_nvmf_ctrlr_model */
2235 uint8_t ctrlr_model : 1;
2236 uint8_t reserved : 7;
2237 } ctrattr;
2238
2239 /** Maximum SGL block descriptors (0 = no limit) */
2240 uint8_t msdbd;
2241
2242 /** Optional fabric commands supported */
2243 struct {
2244 /** Support disconnect command and individual I/O queue deletion */
2245 uint16_t disconnect : 1;
2246 uint16_t reserved : 15;
2247 } ofcs;
2248
2249 uint8_t reserved[242];
2250};
2251
2252/** Identify Controller data SGL support */
2253struct spdk_nvme_cdata_sgls {
2254 uint32_t supported : 2;
2255 uint32_t keyed_sgl : 1;
2256 uint32_t reserved1 : 13;
2257 uint32_t bit_bucket_descriptor : 1;
2258 uint32_t metadata_pointer : 1;
2259 uint32_t oversized_sgl : 1;
2260 uint32_t metadata_address : 1;
2261 uint32_t sgl_offset : 1;
2262 uint32_t transport_sgl : 1;
2263 uint32_t reserved2 : 10;
2264};
2265
2266/** Identify Controller data Optional NVM Command Support */
2267struct spdk_nvme_cdata_oncs {
2268 union {
2269 uint16_t raw;
2270 struct {
2271 /** Compare Command Support */
2272 uint16_t nvmcmps: 1;
2273
2274 /** Write Uncorrectable Support Variants */
2275 uint16_t nvmwusv: 1;
2276
2277 /** Dataset Management Support Variants */
2278 uint16_t nvmdsmsv: 1;
2279
2280 /** Write Zeroes Support Variants */
2281 uint16_t nvmwzsv: 1;
2282
2283 /** Save and Select Feature Support */
2284 uint16_t ssfs: 1;
2285
2286 /** Reservations Support */
2287 uint16_t reservs: 1;
2288
2289 /** Timestamp Support */
2290 uint16_t tss: 1;
2291
2292 /** Verify Support */
2293 uint16_t nvmvfys: 1;
2294
2295 /** Copy Support */
2296 uint16_t nvmcpys: 1;
2297
2298 uint16_t rsvd : 7;
2299 };
2300 };
2301};
2302
2303struct spdk_nvme_cdata_oacs {
2304 /** Security Send Receive Supported */
2305 uint16_t ssrs : 1;
2306
2307 /** Format NVM Supported */
2308 uint16_t fnvms : 1;
2309
2310 /** Firmware Download Supported */
2311 uint16_t fwds : 1;
2312
2313 /** Namespace Management Supported */
2314 uint16_t nms : 1;
2315
2316 /** Device Self-test Supported */
2317 uint16_t dsts : 1;
2318
2319 /** Directives Supported */
2320 uint16_t dirs : 1;
2321
2322 /** Supports NVMe-MI */
2323 uint16_t nsrs : 1;
2324
2325 /** Virtualization Management Supported */
2326 uint16_t vms : 1;
2327
2328 /** Doorbell Buffer Config Supported */
2329 uint16_t dbcs : 1;
2330
2331 /** Get LBA Status Supported */
2332 uint16_t glss : 1;
2333
2334 /** Command and Feature Lockdown Supported */
2335 uint16_t cfls : 1;
2336
2337 /** Host Managed Live Migration Support */
2338 uint16_t hmlms : 1;
2339
2340 uint16_t rsvd : 4;
2341};
2342
2343struct spdk_nvme_cdata_fuses {
2344 union {
2345 uint16_t raw;
2346 struct {
2347 /** Fused Compare and Write Supported */
2348 uint16_t fcws: 1;
2349
2350 uint16_t rsvd: 15;
2351 };
2352 };
2353};
2354
2355struct spdk_nvme_cdata_oaes {
2356 uint32_t reserved1 : 8;
2357
2358 /* Supports sending Namespace Attribute Notices. */
2359 uint32_t ns_attribute_notices : 1;
2360
2361 /* Supports sending Firmware Activation Notices. */
2362 uint32_t fw_activation_notices : 1;
2363
2364 uint32_t reserved2 : 1;
2365
2366 /* Supports Asymmetric Namespace Access Change Notices. */
2367 uint32_t ana_change_notices : 1;
2368
2369 /* Supports Predictable Latency Event Aggregate Log Change Notices. */
2370 uint32_t pleal_change_notices : 1;
2371
2372 /* Supports LBA Status Information Alert Notices. */
2373 uint32_t lba_sia_notices : 1;
2374
2375 /* Supports Endurance Group Event Aggregate Log Page Change Notices. */
2376 uint32_t egealp_change_notices : 1;
2377
2378 /* Supports Normal NVM Subsystem Shutdown event. */
2379 uint32_t nnvm_sse : 1;
2380
2381 uint32_t reserved3 : 11;
2382
2383 /* Supports Zone Descriptor Change Notices (refer to the ZNS Command Set specification) */
2384 uint32_t zdes_change_notices : 1;
2385
2386 uint32_t reserved4 : 3;
2387
2388 /* Supports Discovery log change notices (refer to the NVMe over Fabrics specification) */
2389 uint32_t discovery_log_change_notices : 1;
2390};
2391
2392union spdk_nvme_cdata_ctratt {
2393 uint32_t raw;
2394 struct {
2395 /* Supports 128-bit host identifier */
2396 uint32_t host_id_exhid_supported: 1;
2397
2398 /* Supports non-operational power state permissive mode */
2399 uint32_t non_operational_power_state_permissive_mode: 1;
2400
2401 /* Supports NVM sets */
2402 uint32_t nvm_sets: 1;
2403
2404 /* Supports read recovery levels */
2405 uint32_t read_recovery_levels: 1;
2406
2407 /* Supports endurance groups */
2408 uint32_t endurance_groups: 1;
2409
2410 /* Supports predictable latency mode */
2411 uint32_t predictable_latency_mode: 1;
2412
2413 /* Supports traffic based keep alive */
2414 uint32_t tbkas: 1;
2415
2416 /* Supports reporting of namespace granularity */
2417 uint32_t namespace_granularity: 1;
2418
2419 /* Supports SQ associations */
2420 uint32_t sq_associations: 1;
2421
2422 /* Supports reporting of UUID list */
2423 uint32_t uuid_list: 1;
2424
2425 /* NVM subsystem supports multiple domains */
2426 uint32_t mds: 1;
2427
2428 /* Supports fixed capacity management */
2429 uint32_t fixed_capacity_management: 1;
2430
2431 /* Supports variable capacity management */
2432 uint32_t variable_capacity_management: 1;
2433
2434 /* Supports delete endurance group operation */
2435 uint32_t delete_endurance_group: 1;
2436
2437 /* Supports delete NVM set */
2438 uint32_t delete_nvm_set: 1;
2439
2440 /* Supports I/O command set specific extended PI formats */
2441 uint32_t elbas: 1;
2442
2443 /* MDTS and Size Limits Exclude Metadata (MEM) */
2444 uint32_t mem: 1;
2445
2446 uint32_t reserved1: 2;
2447
2448 /* Supports flexible data placement */
2449 uint32_t fdps: 1;
2450
2451 uint32_t reserved2: 12;
2452 } bits;
2453};
2454
2455#pragma pack(push, 1)
2456struct spdk_nvme_ctrlr_data {
2457 /* bytes 0-255: controller capabilities and features */
2458
2459 /** pci vendor id */
2460 uint16_t vid;
2461
2462 /** pci subsystem vendor id */
2463 uint16_t ssvid;
2464
2465 /** serial number */
2466 int8_t sn[SPDK_NVME_CTRLR_SN_LEN];
2467
2468 /** model number */
2469 int8_t mn[SPDK_NVME_CTRLR_MN_LEN];
2470
2471 /** firmware revision */
2472 uint8_t fr[SPDK_NVME_CTRLR_FR_LEN];
2473
2474 /** recommended arbitration burst */
2475 uint8_t rab;
2476
2477 /** ieee oui identifier */
2478 uint8_t ieee[3];
2479
2480 /** controller multi-path I/O and namespace sharing capabilities */
2481 struct {
2482 /* Multiple Ports */
2483 uint8_t mports : 1;
2484
2485 /* Multiple Controllers */
2486 uint8_t mctrs: 1;
2487
2488 /* Function Type */
2489 uint8_t ft : 1;
2490
2491 /* Asymmetric Namespace Access Reporting Support */
2492 uint8_t anars : 1;
2493 uint8_t rsvd : 4;
2494 } cmic;
2495
2496 /** maximum data transfer size */
2497 uint8_t mdts;
2498
2499 /** controller id */
2500 uint16_t cntlid;
2501
2502 /** version */
2503 union spdk_nvme_vs_register ver;
2504
2505 /** RTD3 resume latency */
2506 uint32_t rtd3r;
2507
2508 /** RTD3 entry latency */
2509 uint32_t rtd3e;
2510
2511 /** optional asynchronous events supported */
2512 struct spdk_nvme_cdata_oaes oaes;
2513
2514 /** controller attributes */
2515 union spdk_nvme_cdata_ctratt ctratt;
2516
2517 /** Read Recovery Levels Supported */
2518 uint16_t rrls;
2519
2520 uint8_t reserved_102[9];
2521
2522 /** Controller Type */
2523 uint8_t cntrltype;
2524
2525 /** FRU globally unique identifier */
2526 uint8_t fguid[16];
2527
2528 /** Command Retry Delay Time 1, 2 and 3 */
2529 uint16_t crdt[3];
2530
2531 uint8_t reserved_134[119];
2532
2533 /** NVM Subsystem Report */
2534 struct {
2535 /* NVM Subsystem part of NVMe storage device */
2536 uint8_t nvmesd : 1;
2537
2538 /* NVM Subsystem part of NVMe enclosure */
2539 uint8_t nvmee : 1;
2540
2541 uint8_t nvmsr_rsvd : 6;
2542 } nvmsr;
2543
2544 /** VPD Write Cycle Information */
2545 struct {
2546 /* VPD write cycles remaining */
2547 uint8_t vwcr : 7;
2548
2549 /* VPD write cycles remaining valid */
2550 uint8_t vwcrv : 1;
2551 } vwci;
2552
2553 /** Management Endpoint Capabilities */
2554 struct {
2555 /* SMBus/I2C Port management endpoint */
2556 uint8_t smbusme : 1;
2557
2558 /* PCIe port management endpoint */
2559 uint8_t pcieme : 1;
2560
2561 uint8_t mec_rsvd : 6;
2562 } mec;
2563
2564 /* bytes 256-511: admin command set attributes */
2565
2566 /** optional admin command support */
2567 struct spdk_nvme_cdata_oacs oacs;
2568
2569 /** abort command limit */
2570 uint8_t acl;
2571
2572 /** asynchronous event request limit */
2573 uint8_t aerl;
2574
2575 /** firmware updates */
2576 struct {
2577 /* first slot is read-only */
2578 uint8_t slot1_ro : 1;
2579
2580 /* number of firmware slots */
2581 uint8_t num_slots : 3;
2582
2583 /* support activation without reset */
2584 uint8_t activation_without_reset : 1;
2585
2586 /* Support multiple update detection */
2587 uint8_t multiple_update_detection : 1;
2588
2589 uint8_t frmw_rsvd : 2;
2590 } frmw;
2591
2592 /** log page attributes */
2593 struct {
2594 /* SMART Support */
2595 uint8_t smarts : 1;
2596 /* Commands Supported and Effects Support */
2597 uint8_t cses : 1;
2598 /* Log Page Extended Data Support */
2599 uint8_t lpeds: 1;
2600 /* Telemetry Support */
2601 uint8_t ts : 1;
2602 /* Persistent Event Support */
2603 uint8_t pes : 1;
2604 /* Miscellaneous Log Page Support */
2605 uint8_t mlps : 1;
2606 /* Data Area 4 Support */
2607 uint8_t da4s : 1;
2608 uint8_t rsvd : 1;
2609 } lpa;
2610
2611 /** error log page entries */
2612 uint8_t elpe;
2613
2614 /** number of power states supported */
2615 uint8_t npss;
2616
2617 /** admin vendor specific command configuration */
2618 struct {
2619 /* admin vendor specific commands use disk format */
2620 uint8_t spec_format : 1;
2621
2622 uint8_t avscc_rsvd : 7;
2623 } avscc;
2624
2625 /** autonomous power state transition attributes */
2626 struct {
2627 /** controller supports autonomous power state transitions */
2628 uint8_t supported : 1;
2629
2630 uint8_t apsta_rsvd : 7;
2631 } apsta;
2632
2633 /** warning composite temperature threshold */
2634 uint16_t wctemp;
2635
2636 /** critical composite temperature threshold */
2637 uint16_t cctemp;
2638
2639 /** maximum time for firmware activation */
2640 uint16_t mtfa;
2641
2642 /** host memory buffer preferred size */
2643 uint32_t hmpre;
2644
2645 /** host memory buffer minimum size */
2646 uint32_t hmmin;
2647
2648 /** total NVM capacity */
2649 uint64_t tnvmcap[2];
2650
2651 /** unallocated NVM capacity */
2652 uint64_t unvmcap[2];
2653
2654 /** replay protected memory block support */
2655 struct {
2656 uint8_t num_rpmb_units : 3;
2657 uint8_t auth_method : 3;
2658 uint8_t reserved1 : 2;
2659
2660 uint8_t reserved2;
2661
2662 uint8_t total_size;
2663 uint8_t access_size;
2664 } rpmbs;
2665
2666 /** extended device self-test time (in minutes) */
2667 uint16_t edstt;
2668
2669 /** device self-test options */
2670 union {
2671 uint8_t raw;
2672 struct {
2673 /** Device supports only one device self-test operation at a time */
2674 uint8_t one_only : 1;
2675
2676 uint8_t reserved : 7;
2677 } bits;
2678 } dsto;
2679
2680 /**
2681 * Firmware update granularity
2682 *
2683 * 4KB units
2684 * 0x00 = no information provided
2685 * 0xFF = no restriction
2686 */
2687 uint8_t fwug;
2688
2689 /**
2690 * Keep Alive Support
2691 *
2692 * Granularity of keep alive timer in 100 ms units
2693 * 0 = keep alive not supported
2694 */
2695 uint16_t kas;
2696
2697 /** Host controlled thermal management attributes */
2698 union {
2699 uint16_t raw;
2700 struct {
2701 uint16_t supported : 1;
2702 uint16_t reserved : 15;
2703 } bits;
2704 } hctma;
2705
2706 /** Minimum thermal management temperature */
2707 uint16_t mntmt;
2708
2709 /** Maximum thermal management temperature */
2710 uint16_t mxtmt;
2711
2712 /** Sanitize capabilities */
2713 union {
2714 uint32_t raw;
2715 struct {
2716 uint32_t crypto_erase : 1;
2717 uint32_t block_erase : 1;
2718 uint32_t overwrite : 1;
2719 uint32_t reserved : 29;
2720 } bits;
2721 } sanicap;
2722
2723 /** Host memory buffer minimum descriptor entry size */
2724 uint32_t hmminds;
2725
2726 /** Host memory maximum descriptor entries */
2727 uint16_t hmmaxd;
2728
2729 /** NVM set identifier maximum */
2730 uint16_t nsetidmax;
2731
2732 /** Endurance group identifier maximum */
2733 uint16_t endgidmax;
2734
2735 /** ANA transition time */
2736 uint8_t anatt;
2737
2738 /* bytes 343: Asymmetric namespace access capabilities */
2739 struct {
2740 uint8_t ana_optimized_state : 1;
2741 uint8_t ana_non_optimized_state : 1;
2742 uint8_t ana_inaccessible_state : 1;
2743 uint8_t ana_persistent_loss_state : 1;
2744 uint8_t ana_change_state : 1;
2745 uint8_t reserved : 1;
2746 uint8_t no_change_anagrpid : 1;
2747 uint8_t non_zero_anagrpid : 1;
2748 } anacap;
2749
2750 /* bytes 344-347: ANA group identifier maximum */
2751 uint32_t anagrpmax;
2752 /* bytes 348-351: number of ANA group identifiers */
2753 uint32_t nanagrpid;
2754
2755 /* bytes 352-355: persistent event log size */
2756 uint32_t pels;
2757
2758 /* Domain identifier that contains this controller */
2759 uint16_t domain_identifier;
2760
2761 uint8_t reserved3[10];
2762
2763 /* Maximum capacity of a single endurance group */
2764 uint8_t megcap[SPDK_NVME_CTRLR_MEGCAP_LEN];
2765
2766 /* bytes 384-511 */
2767 uint8_t reserved384[128];
2768
2769 /* bytes 512-703: nvm command set attributes */
2770
2771 /** submission queue entry size */
2772 struct {
2773 uint8_t min : 4;
2774 uint8_t max : 4;
2775 } sqes;
2776
2777 /** completion queue entry size */
2778 struct {
2779 uint8_t min : 4;
2780 uint8_t max : 4;
2781 } cqes;
2782
2783 uint16_t maxcmd;
2784
2785 /** number of namespaces */
2786 uint32_t nn;
2787
2788 /** optional nvm command support */
2789 struct spdk_nvme_cdata_oncs oncs;
2790
2791 /** fused operation support */
2792 struct spdk_nvme_cdata_fuses fuses;
2793
2794 /** format nvm attributes */
2795 struct {
2796 uint8_t format_all_ns: 1;
2797 uint8_t erase_all_ns: 1;
2798 uint8_t crypto_erase_supported: 1;
2799 uint8_t reserved: 5;
2800 } fna;
2801
2802 /** volatile write cache */
2803 struct {
2804 uint8_t present : 1;
2805 uint8_t flush_broadcast : 2;
2806 uint8_t reserved : 5;
2807 } vwc;
2808
2809 /** atomic write unit normal */
2810 uint16_t awun;
2811
2812 /** atomic write unit power fail */
2813 uint16_t awupf;
2814
2815 /** NVM vendor specific command configuration */
2816 uint8_t nvscc;
2817
