2818 /** Namespace Write Protection Capabilities */
2819 uint8_t nwpc;
2820
2821 /** atomic compare & write unit */
2822 uint16_t acwu;
2823
2824 /** optional copy formats supported */
2825 struct {
2826 uint16_t copy_format0 : 1;
2827 uint16_t reserved1: 15;
2828 } ocfs;
2829
2830
2831 struct spdk_nvme_cdata_sgls sgls;
2832
2833 /* maximum number of allowed namespaces */
2834 uint32_t mnan;
2835
2836 /* maximum domain namespace attachments */
2837 uint8_t maxdna[SPDK_NVME_MAXDNA_FIELD_SIZE];
2838
2839 /* maximum I/O controller namespace attachments */
2840 uint32_t maxcna;
2841
2842 uint8_t reserved4[204];
2843
2844 uint8_t subnqn[SPDK_NVME_NQN_FIELD_SIZE];
2845
2846 uint8_t reserved5[768];
2847
2848 struct spdk_nvme_cdata_nvmf_specific nvmf_specific;
2849
2850 /* bytes 2048-3071: power state descriptors */
2851 struct spdk_nvme_power_state psd[32];
2852
2853 /* bytes 3072-4095: vendor specific */
2854 uint8_t vs[1024];
2855};
2856SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_ctrlr_data) == 4096, "Incorrect size");
2857#pragma pack(pop)
2858
2859struct spdk_nvme_zns_ctrlr_data {
2860 /** zone append size limit */
2861 uint8_t zasl;
2862
2863 uint8_t reserved1[4095];
2864};
2865SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_zns_ctrlr_data) == 4096, "Incorrect size");
2866
2867struct spdk_nvme_kv_ctrlr_data {
2868 /** maximum key size */
2869 uint8_t mks;
2870
2871 uint8_t reserved1[4095];
2872};
2873SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_kv_ctrlr_data) == 4096, "Incorrect size");
2874
2875#pragma pack(push, 1)
2876struct spdk_nvme_primary_ctrl_capabilities {
2877 /** controller id */
2878 uint16_t cntlid;
2879 /** port identifier */
2880 uint16_t portid;
2881 /** controller resource types */
2882 struct {
2883 uint8_t vq_supported : 1;
2884 uint8_t vi_supported : 1;
2885 uint8_t reserved : 6;
2886 } crt;
2887 uint8_t reserved[27];
2888 /** total number of VQ flexible resources */
2889 uint32_t vqfrt;
2890 /** total number of VQ flexible resources assigned to secondary controllers */
2891 uint32_t vqrfa;
2892 /** total number of VQ flexible resources allocated to primary controller */
2893 uint16_t vqrfap;
2894 /** total number of VQ Private resources for the primary controller */
2895 uint16_t vqprt;
2896 /** max number of VQ flexible Resources that may be assigned to a secondary controller */
2897 uint16_t vqfrsm;
2898 /** preferred granularity of assigning and removing VQ Flexible Resources */
2899 uint16_t vqgran;
2900 uint8_t reserved1[16];
2901 /** total number of VI flexible resources for the primary and its secondary controllers */
2902 uint32_t vifrt;
2903 /** total number of VI flexible resources assigned to the secondary controllers */
2904 uint32_t virfa;
2905 /** total number of VI flexible resources currently allocated to the primary controller */
2906 uint16_t virfap;
2907 /** total number of VI private resources for the primary controller */
2908 uint16_t viprt;
2909 /** max number of VI flexible resources that may be assigned to a secondary controller */
2910 uint16_t vifrsm;
2911 /** preferred granularity of assigning and removing VI flexible resources */
2912 uint16_t vigran;
2913 uint8_t reserved2[4016];
2914};
2915SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_primary_ctrl_capabilities) == 4096, "Incorrect size");
2916
2917struct spdk_nvme_secondary_ctrl_entry {
2918 /** controller identifier of the secondary controller */
2919 uint16_t scid;
2920 /** controller identifier of the associated primary controller */
2921 uint16_t pcid;
2922 /** indicates the state of the secondary controller */
2923 struct {
2924 uint8_t is_online : 1;
2925 uint8_t reserved : 7;
2926 } scs;
2927 uint8_t reserved[3];
2928 /** VF number if the secondary controller is an SR-IOV VF */
2929 uint16_t vfn;
2930 /** number of VQ flexible resources assigned to the indicated secondary controller */
2931 uint16_t nvq;
2932 /** number of VI flexible resources assigned to the indicated secondary controller */
2933 uint16_t nvi;
2934 uint8_t reserved1[18];
2935};
2936SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_secondary_ctrl_entry) == 32, "Incorrect size");
2937
2938struct spdk_nvme_secondary_ctrl_list {
2939 /** number of Secondary controller entries in the list */
2940 uint8_t number;
2941 uint8_t reserved[31];
2942 struct spdk_nvme_secondary_ctrl_entry entries[127];
2943};
2944SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_secondary_ctrl_list) == 4096, "Incorrect size");
2945#pragma pack(pop)
2946
2947struct spdk_nvme_rescap {
2948 /** Persist Through Power Loss Support */
2949 uint8_t ptpls : 1;
2950 /** Write Exclusive Support */
2951 uint8_t wes : 1;
2952 /** Exclusive Access Support */
2953 uint8_t eas : 1;
2954 /** Write Exclusive – Registrants Only Support */
2955 uint8_t weros : 1;
2956 /** Exclusive Access – Registrants Only Support */
2957 uint8_t earos : 1;
2958 /** Write Exclusive – All Registrants Support */
2959 uint8_t wears : 1;
2960 /** Exclusive Access – All Registrants Support */
2961 uint8_t eaars : 1;
2962 /** Ignore Existing Key Support */
2963 uint8_t ieks : 1;
2964};
2965SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_rescap) == 1, "Incorrect size");
2966
2967struct spdk_nvme_fpi {
2968 /** Remaining Format NVM */
2969 uint8_t rfnvm : 7;
2970 /** Format Progress Indicator Support */
2971 uint8_t fpis : 1;
2972};
2973SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_fpi) == 1, "Incorrect size");
2974
2975struct spdk_nvme_nmic {
2976 /** Shared Namespace */
2977 uint8_t shrns : 1;
2978 /** Dispersed Namespace */
2979 uint8_t disns : 1;
2980 /** Reserved */
2981 uint8_t rsvd : 6;
2982};
2983SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_nmic) == 1, "Incorrect size");
2984
2985struct spdk_nvme_nsattr {
2986 /** Currently Write Protected */
2987 uint8_t cwp : 1;
2988 /** Reserved */
2989 uint8_t rsvd : 7;
2990};
2991SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_nsattr) == 1, "Incorrect size");
2992
2993struct spdk_nvme_ns_data {
2994 /** namespace size */
2995 uint64_t nsze;
2996
2997 /** namespace capacity */
2998 uint64_t ncap;
2999
3000 /** namespace utilization */
3001 uint64_t nuse;
3002
3003 /** namespace features */
3004 struct {
3005 /** thin provisioning */
3006 uint8_t thin_prov : 1;
3007
3008 /** NAWUN, NAWUPF, and NACWU are defined for this namespace */
3009 uint8_t ns_atomic_write_unit : 1;
3010
3011 /** Supports Deallocated or Unwritten LBA error for this namespace */
3012 uint8_t dealloc_or_unwritten_error : 1;
3013
3014 /** Non-zero NGUID and EUI64 for namespace are never reused */
3015 uint8_t guid_never_reused : 1;
3016
3017 /** Optimal Performance field */
3018 uint8_t optperf : 1;
3019
3020 uint8_t reserved1 : 3;
3021 } nsfeat;
3022
3023 /** number of lba formats */
3024 uint8_t nlbaf;
3025
3026 /** formatted lba size */
3027 struct {
3028 /** LSB for Format index */
3029 uint8_t format : 4;
3030 uint8_t extended : 1;
3031 /** MSB for Format index, to be ignored if nlbaf <= 16 */
3032 uint8_t msb_format : 2;
3033 uint8_t reserved2 : 1;
3034 } flbas;
3035
3036 /** metadata capabilities */
3037 struct {
3038 /** metadata can be transferred as part of data prp list */
3039 uint8_t extended : 1;
3040
3041 /** metadata can be transferred with separate metadata pointer */
3042 uint8_t pointer : 1;
3043
3044 /** reserved */
3045 uint8_t reserved3 : 6;
3046 } mc;
3047
3048 /** end-to-end data protection capabilities */
3049 struct {
3050 /** protection information type 1 */
3051 uint8_t pit1 : 1;
3052
3053 /** protection information type 2 */
3054 uint8_t pit2 : 1;
3055
3056 /** protection information type 3 */
3057 uint8_t pit3 : 1;
3058
3059 /** first eight bytes of metadata */
3060 uint8_t md_start : 1;
3061
3062 /** last eight bytes of metadata */
3063 uint8_t md_end : 1;
3064 } dpc;
3065
3066 /** end-to-end data protection type settings */
3067 struct {
3068 /** protection information type */
3069 uint8_t pit : 3;
3070
3071 /** 1 == protection info transferred at start of metadata */
3072 /** 0 == protection info transferred at end of metadata */
3073 uint8_t md_start : 1;
3074
3075 uint8_t reserved4 : 4;
3076 } dps;
3077
3078 /** namespace multi-path I/O and namespace sharing capabilities */
3079 struct spdk_nvme_nmic nmic;
3080
3081 /** reservation capabilities */
3082 union {
3083 struct spdk_nvme_rescap rescap;
3084 uint8_t raw;
3085 } nsrescap;
3086 /** format progress indicator */
3087 struct spdk_nvme_fpi fpi;
3088
3089 /** deallocate logical features */
3090 union {
3091 uint8_t raw;
3092 struct {
3093 /**
3094 * Value read from deallocated blocks
3095 *
3096 * 000b = not reported
3097 * 001b = all bytes 0x00
3098 * 010b = all bytes 0xFF
3099 *
3100 * \ref spdk_nvme_dealloc_logical_block_read_value
3101 */
3102 uint8_t read_value : 3;
3103
3104 /** Supports Deallocate bit in Write Zeroes */
3105 uint8_t write_zero_deallocate : 1;
3106
3107 /**
3108 * Guard field behavior for deallocated logical blocks
3109 * 0: contains 0xFFFF
3110 * 1: contains CRC for read value
3111 */
3112 uint8_t guard_value : 1;
3113
3114 uint8_t reserved : 3;
3115 } bits;
3116 } dlfeat;
3117
3118 /** namespace atomic write unit normal */
3119 uint16_t nawun;
3120
3121 /** namespace atomic write unit power fail */
3122 uint16_t nawupf;
3123
3124 /** namespace atomic compare & write unit */
3125 uint16_t nacwu;
3126
3127 /** namespace atomic boundary size normal */
3128 uint16_t nabsn;
3129
3130 /** namespace atomic boundary offset */
3131 uint16_t nabo;
3132
3133 /** namespace atomic boundary size power fail */
3134 uint16_t nabspf;
3135
3136 /** namespace optimal I/O boundary in logical blocks */
3137 uint16_t noiob;
3138
3139 /** NVM capacity */
3140 uint64_t nvmcap[2];
3141
3142 /** Namespace Preferred Write Granularity */
3143 uint16_t npwg;
3144
3145 /** Namespace Preferred Write Alignment */
3146 uint16_t npwa;
3147
3148 /** Namespace Preferred Deallocate Granularity */
3149 uint16_t npdg;
3150
3151 /** Namespace Preferred Deallocate Alignment */
3152 uint16_t npda;
3153
3154 /** Namespace Optimal Write Size */
3155 uint16_t nows;
3156
3157 /** Maximum Single Source Range Length */
3158 uint16_t mssrl;
3159
3160 /** Maximum Copy Length */
3161 uint32_t mcl;
3162
3163 /** Maximum Source Range Count */
3164 uint8_t msrc;
3165
3166 uint8_t reserved81[11];
3167
3168 /** ANA group identifier */
3169 uint32_t anagrpid;
3170
3171 uint8_t reserved96[3];
3172
3173 /** namespace attributes */
3174 struct spdk_nvme_nsattr nsattr;
3175
3176 /** NVM Set Identifier */
3177 uint16_t nvmsetid;
3178
3179 /** Endurance group identifier */
3180 uint16_t endgid;
3181
3182 /** namespace globally unique identifier */
3183 uint8_t nguid[16];
3184
3185 /** IEEE extended unique identifier */
3186 uint64_t eui64;
3187
3188 /** lba format support */
3189 struct {
3190 /** metadata size */
3191 uint32_t ms : 16;
3192
3193 /** lba data size */
3194 uint32_t lbads : 8;
3195
3196 /** relative performance */
3197 uint32_t rp : 2;
3198
3199 uint32_t reserved6 : 6;
3200 } lbaf[64];
3201
3202 uint8_t vendor_specific[3712];
3203};
3204SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_ns_data) == 4096, "Incorrect size");
3205
3206enum spdk_nvme_pi_format {
3207 SPDK_NVME_16B_GUARD_PI = 0,
3208 SPDK_NVME_32B_GUARD_PI = 1,
3209 SPDK_NVME_64B_GUARD_PI = 2,
3210};
3211
3212struct spdk_nvme_nvm_ns_data {
3213 /** logical block storage tag mask */
3214 uint64_t lbstm;
3215
3216 /** protection information capabilities */
3217 struct {
3218 /** 16b guard protection information storage tag support */
3219 uint8_t _16bpists : 1;
3220
3221 /** 16b guard protection information storage tag mask */
3222 uint8_t _16bpistm : 1;
3223
3224 /** storage tag check read support */
3225 uint8_t stcrs : 1;
3226
3227 uint8_t reserved : 5;
3228 } pic;
3229
3230 uint8_t reserved[3];
3231
3232 struct {
3233 /** storage tag size */
3234 uint32_t sts : 7;
3235
3236 /** protection information format */
3237 uint32_t pif : 2;
3238
3239 uint32_t reserved : 23;
3240 } elbaf[64];
3241
3242 uint8_t reserved2[3828];
3243};
3244SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_nvm_ns_data) == 4096, "Incorrect size");
3245
3246struct spdk_nvme_nvm_ctrlr_data {
3247 /* verify size limit */
3248 uint8_t vsl;
3249
3250 /* write zeroes size limit */
3251 uint8_t wzsl;
3252
3253 /* write uncorrectable size limit */
3254 uint8_t wusl;
3255
3256 /* dataset management ranges limit */
3257 uint8_t dmrl;
3258
3259 /* dataset management range size limit */
3260 uint32_t dmrsl;
3261
3262 /* dataset management size limit */
3263 uint64_t dmsl;
3264
3265 uint8_t rsvd16[4080];
3266};
3267SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_nvm_ctrlr_data) == 4096, "Incorrect size");
3268
3269struct spdk_nvme_zns_ns_data {
3270 /** zone operation characteristics */
3271 struct {
3272 uint16_t variable_zone_capacity : 1;
3273 uint16_t zone_active_excursions : 1;
3274 uint16_t reserved0 : 14;
3275 } zoc;
3276
3277 /** optional zoned command support */
3278 struct {
3279 uint16_t read_across_zone_boundaries : 1;
3280 uint16_t reserved0 : 15;
3281 } ozcs;
3282
3283 /** maximum active resources */
3284 uint32_t mar;
3285
3286 /** maximum open resources */
3287 uint32_t mor;
3288
3289 /** reset recommended limit */
3290 uint32_t rrl;
3291
3292 /** finish recommended limit */
3293 uint32_t frl;
3294
3295 /** reset recommended limit 1 */
3296 uint32_t rrl1;
3297
3298 /** reset recommended limit 2 */
3299 uint32_t rrl2;
3300
3301 /** reset recommended limit 3 */
3302 uint32_t rrl3;
3303
3304 /** finish recommended limit 1 */
3305 uint32_t frl1;
3306
3307 /** finish recommended limit 2 */
3308 uint32_t frl2;
3309
3310 /** finish recommended limit 3 */
3311 uint32_t frl3;
3312
3313 uint8_t reserved44[2772];
3314
3315 /** zns lba format extension support */
3316 struct {
3317 /** zone size */
3318 uint64_t zsze;
3319
3320 /** zone descriptor extension size */
3321 uint64_t zdes : 8;
3322
3323 uint64_t reserved15 : 56;
3324 } lbafe[64];
3325
3326 uint8_t vendor_specific[256];
3327};
3328SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_zns_ns_data) == 4096, "Incorrect size");
3329
3330#pragma pack(push, 1)
3331struct spdk_nvme_kv_ns_data {
3332 /** maximum key size */
3333 uint8_t mks;
3334
3335 /** maximum value size */
3336 uint32_t mvs;
3337
3338 /** optimal value size */
3339 uint32_t ovs;
3340
3341 /** key alignment */
3342 uint8_t ka;
3343
3344 /** value alignment */
3345 uint8_t va;
3346
3347 uint8_t reserved[4085];
3348};
3349SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_kv_ns_data) == 4096, "Incorrect size");
3350#pragma pack(pop)
3351
3352/** Identify – I/O Command Set Independent Identify Namespace Data Structure (CNS 08h) */
3353struct spdk_nvme_ns_iocs_independent_data {
3354 /** Common Namespace Features */
3355 struct {
3356 uint8_t reserved1 : 3;
3357 /** UID Reuse */
3358 uint8_t uidreuse : 1;
3359 /** Rotational Media */
3360 uint8_t rmedia : 1;
3361 /** Volatile Write Cache Not Present */
3362 uint8_t vwcnp : 1;
3363 uint8_t reserved2 : 2;
3364 } nsfeat;
3365
3366 /** Namespace Multi-path I/O and Namespace Sharing Capabilities */
3367 struct spdk_nvme_nmic nmic;
3368
3369 /** Reservation Capabilities */
3370 struct spdk_nvme_rescap rescap;
3371
3372 /** Format Progress Indicator */
3373 struct spdk_nvme_fpi fpi;
3374
3375 /** ANA Group Identifier */
3376 uint32_t anagrpid;
3377
3378 /** Namespace Attributes */
3379 struct spdk_nvme_nsattr nsattr;
3380
3381 uint8_t reserved1;
3382
3383 /** NVM Set Identifier */
3384 uint16_t nvmsetid;
3385
3386 /** Endurance Group Identifier */
3387 uint16_t endgid;
3388
3389 /** Namespace Status */
3390 struct {
3391 /** Namespace Ready */
3392 uint8_t nrdy : 1;
3393 /** I/O Impacted */
3394 uint8_t ioi : 2;
3395 uint8_t reserved : 5;
3396 } nstat;
3397
3398 /** Key Per I/O Status */
3399 struct {
3400 /** Key Per I/O Enabled in Namespace */
3401 uint8_t kpioens : 1;
3402 /** Key Per I/O Supported in Namespace */
3403 uint8_t kpiosns : 1;
3404 uint8_t reserved : 6;
3405 } kpios;
3406
3407 /** Maximum Key Tag */
3408 uint16_t maxkt;
3409
3410 uint16_t reserved2;
3411
3412 /** Reachability Group Identifier */
3413 uint32_t rgrpid;
3414
3415 uint8_t reserved3[4072];
3416};
3417SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_ns_iocs_independent_data) == 4096, "Incorrect size");
3418
3419/**
3420 * IO command set vector for IDENTIFY_IOCS
3421 */
3422struct spdk_nvme_iocs_vector {
3423 uint8_t nvm : 1;
3424 uint8_t kv : 1;
3425 uint8_t zns : 1;
3426 uint8_t rsvd : 5;
3427 uint8_t rsvd2[7];
3428};
3429SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_iocs_vector) == 8, "Incorrect size");
3430
3431/**
3432 * Deallocated logical block features - read value
3433 */
3434enum spdk_nvme_dealloc_logical_block_read_value {
3435 /** Not reported */
3436 SPDK_NVME_DEALLOC_NOT_REPORTED = 0,
3437
3438 /** Deallocated blocks read 0x00 */
3439 SPDK_NVME_DEALLOC_READ_00 = 1,
3440
3441 /** Deallocated blocks read 0xFF */
3442 SPDK_NVME_DEALLOC_READ_FF = 2,
3443};
3444
3445/**
3446 * Reservation Type Encoding
3447 */
3448enum spdk_nvme_reservation_type {
3449 /* 0x00 - reserved */
3450
3451 /* Write Exclusive Reservation */
3452 SPDK_NVME_RESERVE_WRITE_EXCLUSIVE = 0x1,
3453
3454 /* Exclusive Access Reservation */
3455 SPDK_NVME_RESERVE_EXCLUSIVE_ACCESS = 0x2,
3456
3457 /* Write Exclusive - Registrants Only Reservation */
3458 SPDK_NVME_RESERVE_WRITE_EXCLUSIVE_REG_ONLY = 0x3,
3459
3460 /* Exclusive Access - Registrants Only Reservation */
3461 SPDK_NVME_RESERVE_EXCLUSIVE_ACCESS_REG_ONLY = 0x4,
3462
3463 /* Write Exclusive - All Registrants Reservation */
3464 SPDK_NVME_RESERVE_WRITE_EXCLUSIVE_ALL_REGS = 0x5,
3465
3466 /* Exclusive Access - All Registrants Reservation */
3467 SPDK_NVME_RESERVE_EXCLUSIVE_ACCESS_ALL_REGS = 0x6,
3468
3469 /* 0x7-0xFF - Reserved */
3470};
3471
3472struct spdk_nvme_reservation_acquire_data {
3473 /** current reservation key */
3474 uint64_t crkey;
3475 /** preempt reservation key */
3476 uint64_t prkey;
3477};
3478SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_reservation_acquire_data) == 16, "Incorrect size");
3479
3480/**
3481 * Reservation Acquire action
3482 */
3483enum spdk_nvme_reservation_acquire_action {
3484 SPDK_NVME_RESERVE_ACQUIRE = 0x0,
3485 SPDK_NVME_RESERVE_PREEMPT = 0x1,
3486 SPDK_NVME_RESERVE_PREEMPT_ABORT = 0x2,
3487};
3488
3489#pragma pack(push, 1)
3490struct spdk_nvme_reservation_status_data {
3491 /** reservation action generation counter */
3492 uint32_t gen;
3493 /** reservation type */
3494 uint8_t rtype;
3495 /** number of registered controllers */
3496 uint16_t regctl;
3497 uint16_t reserved1;
3498 /** persist through power loss state */
3499 uint8_t ptpls;
3500 uint8_t reserved[14];
3501};
3502SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_reservation_status_data) == 24, "Incorrect size");
3503
3504struct spdk_nvme_reservation_status_extended_data {
3505 struct spdk_nvme_reservation_status_data data;
3506 uint8_t reserved[40];
3507};
3508SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_reservation_status_extended_data) == 64,
3509 "Incorrect size");
3510
3511struct spdk_nvme_registered_ctrlr_data {
3512 /** controller id */
3513 uint16_t cntlid;
3514 /** reservation status */
3515 struct {
3516 uint8_t status : 1;
3517 uint8_t reserved1 : 7;
3518 } rcsts;
3519 uint8_t reserved2[5];
3520 /** 64-bit host identifier */
3521 uint64_t hostid;
3522 /** reservation key */
3523 uint64_t rkey;
3524};
3525SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_registered_ctrlr_data) == 24, "Incorrect size");
3526
3527struct spdk_nvme_registered_ctrlr_extended_data {
3528 /** controller id */
3529 uint16_t cntlid;
3530 /** reservation status */
3531 struct {
3532 uint8_t status : 1;
3533 uint8_t reserved1 : 7;
3534 } rcsts;
3535 uint8_t reserved2[5];
3536 /** reservation key */
3537 uint64_t rkey;
3538 /** 128-bit host identifier */
3539 uint8_t hostid[16];
3540 uint8_t reserved3[32];
3541};
3542SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_registered_ctrlr_extended_data) == 64, "Incorrect size");
3543#pragma pack(pop)
3544
3545/**
3546 * Change persist through power loss state for
3547 * Reservation Register command
3548 */
3549enum spdk_nvme_reservation_register_cptpl {
3550 SPDK_NVME_RESERVE_PTPL_NO_CHANGES = 0x0,
3551 SPDK_NVME_RESERVE_PTPL_CLEAR_POWER_ON = 0x2,
3552 SPDK_NVME_RESERVE_PTPL_PERSIST_POWER_LOSS = 0x3,
3553};
3554
3555/**
3556 * Registration action for Reservation Register command
3557 */
3558enum spdk_nvme_reservation_register_action {
3559 SPDK_NVME_RESERVE_REGISTER_KEY = 0x0,
3560 SPDK_NVME_RESERVE_UNREGISTER_KEY = 0x1,
3561 SPDK_NVME_RESERVE_REPLACE_KEY = 0x2,
3562};
3563
3564struct spdk_nvme_reservation_register_data {
3565 /** current reservation key */
3566 uint64_t crkey;
3567 /** new reservation key */
3568 uint64_t nrkey;
3569};
3570SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_reservation_register_data) == 16, "Incorrect size");
3571
3572struct spdk_nvme_reservation_key_data {
3573 /** current reservation key */
3574 uint64_t crkey;
3575};
3576SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_reservation_key_data) == 8, "Incorrect size");
3577
3578/**
3579 * Reservation Release action
3580 */
3581enum spdk_nvme_reservation_release_action {
3582 SPDK_NVME_RESERVE_RELEASE = 0x0,
3583 SPDK_NVME_RESERVE_CLEAR = 0x1,
3584};
3585
3586/**
3587 * Reservation notification log page type
3588 */
3589enum spdk_nvme_reservation_notification_log_page_type {
3590 SPDK_NVME_RESERVATION_LOG_PAGE_EMPTY = 0x0,
3591 SPDK_NVME_REGISTRATION_PREEMPTED = 0x1,
3592 SPDK_NVME_RESERVATION_RELEASED = 0x2,
3593 SPDK_NVME_RESERVATION_PREEMPTED = 0x3,
3594};
3595
3596/**
3597 * Reservation notification log
3598 */
3599struct spdk_nvme_reservation_notification_log {
3600 /** 64-bit incrementing reservation notification log page count */
3601 uint64_t log_page_count;
3602 /** Reservation notification log page type */
3603 uint8_t type;
3604 /** Number of additional available reservation notification log pages */
3605 uint8_t num_avail_log_pages;
3606 uint8_t reserved[2];
3607 uint32_t nsid;
3608 uint8_t reserved1[48];
3609};
3610SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_reservation_notification_log) == 64, "Incorrect size");
3611
3612/* Mask Registration Preempted Notification */
3613#define SPDK_NVME_REGISTRATION_PREEMPTED_MASK (1U << 1)
3614/* Mask Reservation Released Notification */
3615#define SPDK_NVME_RESERVATION_RELEASED_MASK (1U << 2)
3616/* Mask Reservation Preempted Notification */
3617#define SPDK_NVME_RESERVATION_PREEMPTED_MASK (1U << 3)
3618
3619/**
3620 * Log page identifiers for SPDK_NVME_OPC_GET_LOG_PAGE
3621 */
3622enum spdk_nvme_log_page {
3623 /** Supported log pages (optional) */
3624 SPDK_NVME_LOG_SUPPORTED_LOG_PAGES = 0x00,
3625
3626 /** Error information (mandatory) - \ref spdk_nvme_error_information_entry */
3627 SPDK_NVME_LOG_ERROR = 0x01,
3628
3629 /** SMART / health information (mandatory) - \ref spdk_nvme_health_information_page */
3630 SPDK_NVME_LOG_HEALTH_INFORMATION = 0x02,
3631
3632 /** Firmware slot information (mandatory) - \ref spdk_nvme_firmware_page */
3633 SPDK_NVME_LOG_FIRMWARE_SLOT = 0x03,
3634
3635 /** Changed namespace list (optional) */
3636 SPDK_NVME_LOG_CHANGED_NS_LIST = 0x04,
3637
3638 /** Command effects log (optional) */
3639 SPDK_NVME_LOG_COMMAND_EFFECTS_LOG = 0x05,
3640
3641 /** Device self test (optional) */
3642 SPDK_NVME_LOG_DEVICE_SELF_TEST = 0x06,
3643
3644 /** Host initiated telemetry log (optional) */
3645 SPDK_NVME_LOG_TELEMETRY_HOST_INITIATED = 0x07,
3646
3647 /** Controller initiated telemetry log (optional) */
3648 SPDK_NVME_LOG_TELEMETRY_CTRLR_INITIATED = 0x08,
3649
3650 /** Endurance group Information (optional) */
3651 SPDK_NVME_LOG_ENDURANCE_GROUP_INFORMATION = 0x09,
3652
3653 /** Predictable latency per NVM set (optional) */
3654 SPDK_NVME_LOG_PREDICATBLE_LATENCY = 0x0A,
3655
3656 /** Predictable latency event aggregate (optional) */
3657 SPDK_NVME_LOG_PREDICTABLE_LATENCY_EVENT = 0x0B,
3658
3659 /** Asymmetric namespace access log (optional) */
3660 SPDK_NVME_LOG_ASYMMETRIC_NAMESPACE_ACCESS = 0x0C,
3661
3662 /** Persistent event log (optional) */
3663 SPDK_NVME_LOG_PERSISTENT_EVENT_LOG = 0x0D,
3664
3665 /* 0x0E NVM command set specific */
3666
3667 /** Endurance group event aggregate (optional) */
3668 SPDK_NVME_LOG_ENDURANCE_GROUP_EVENT = 0x0F,
3669
3670 /** Media unit status (optional) */
3671 SPDK_NVME_LOG_MEDIA_UNIT_STATUS = 0x10,
3672
3673 /** Supported capacity configuration list (optional) */
3674 SPDK_NVME_LOG_CAPACITY_CONFIGURATION_LIST = 0x11,
3675
3676 /** Feature identifiers supported and effects (optional) */
3677 SPDK_NVME_LOG_FEATURE_IDS_EFFECTS = 0x12,
3678
3679 /** NVMe-MI commands supported and effects (optional) */
3680 SPDK_NVME_LOG_NVME_MI_COMMANDS_EFFECTS = 0x13,
3681
3682 /** Command and feature lockdown (optional) */
3683 SPDK_NVME_LOG_COMMAND_FEATURE_LOCKDOWN = 0x14,
3684
3685 /** Boot partition (optional) */
3686 SPDK_NVME_LOG_BOOT_PARTITION = 0x15,
3687
3688 /** Rotational media information (optional) */
3689 SPDK_NVME_LOG_ROTATIONAL_MEDIA_INFORMATION = 0x16,
3690
3691 /* 0x17-0x1f - reserved */
3692
3693 /** FDP configurations (optional) */
3694 SPDK_NVME_LOG_FDP_CONFIGURATIONS = 0x20,
3695
3696 /** Reclaim unit handle usage (optional) */
3697 SPDK_NVME_LOG_RECLAIM_UNIT_HANDLE_USAGE = 0x21,
3698
3699 /** FDP statistics (optional) */
3700 SPDK_NVME_LOG_FDP_STATISTICS = 0x22,
3701
3702 /** FDP events (optional) */
3703 SPDK_NVME_LOG_FDP_EVENTS = 0x23,
3704
3705 /* 0x24-0x6f - reserved */
3706
3707 /** Discovery(refer to the NVMe over Fabrics specification) */
3708 SPDK_NVME_LOG_DISCOVERY = 0x70,
3709
3710 /* 0x71-0x7f - reserved for NVMe over Fabrics */
3711
3712 /** Reservation notification (optional) */
3713 SPDK_NVME_LOG_RESERVATION_NOTIFICATION = 0x80,
3714
3715 /** Sanitize status (optional) */
3716 SPDK_NVME_LOG_SANITIZE_STATUS = 0x81,
3717
3718 /* 0x82-0xBE - I/O command set specific */
3719
3720 /** Changed zone list (refer to Zoned Namespace command set) */
3721 SPDK_NVME_LOG_CHANGED_ZONE_LIST = 0xBF,
3722
3723 /* 0xC0-0xFF - vendor specific */
3724 SPDK_NVME_LOG_VENDOR_SPECIFIC_START = 0xc0,
3725 SPDK_NVME_LOG_VENDOR_SPECIFIC_END = 0xff,
3726};
3727
3728#define spdk_nvme_log_page_is_vendor_specific(lid) ((lid) >= SPDK_NVME_LOG_VENDOR_SPECIFIC_START)
3729
3730struct spdk_nvme_supported_log_pages {
3731 /* Log Page Identifier Supported 0-255 */
3732 struct {
3733 /* LID Supported - 0 */
3734 uint32_t lsupp : 1;
3735 /* Index Offset Supported - 1 */
3736 uint32_t ios : 1;
3737 /* Reserved - 2:15 */
3738 uint32_t reserved : 14;
3739 /* LID Specific Parameter - 16:31 */
3740 uint32_t lidsp : 16;
3741 } lids[256];
3742};
3743SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_supported_log_pages) == 1024, "Incorrect size");
3744
3745/* Feature Identifiers Effects Log Page */
3746struct spdk_nvme_feature_ids_effects_log_page {
3747 /* Feature Identifier Supported 0-255 */
3748 struct {
3749 /* FID Supported - 0 */
3750 uint32_t fsupp : 1;
3751 /* User Data Content Change - 1 */
3752 uint32_t udcc : 1;
3753 /* Namespace Capability Change - 2 */
3754 uint32_t ncc : 1;
3755 /* Namespace Inventory Change - 3 */
3756 uint32_t nic : 1;
3757 /* Controller Capability Change - 4 */
3758 uint32_t ccc : 1;
3759 /* Reserved - 5:18 */
3760 uint32_t reserved : 14;
3761 /* UUID Selection Supported - 19 */
3762 uint32_t uss : 1;
3763
3764 /* FID scope (FSP) - 20:31 */
3765 /* FID scope - Namespace Scope - 0 */
3766 uint32_t nscpe : 1;
3767 /* FID scope - Controller Scope - 1 */
3768 uint32_t cscpe : 1;
3769 /* FID scope - NVM Set Scope - 2 */
3770 uint32_t nsetscpe : 1;
3771 /* FID scope - Endurance Group Scope - 3 */
3772 uint32_t egscpe : 1;
3773 /* FID scope - Domain Scope - 4 */
3774 uint32_t dscpe : 1;
3775 /* FID scope - NVM Subsystem Scope - 5 */
3776 uint32_t nsscpe : 1;
3777 /* FID scope - Controller Data Queue - 6 */
3778 uint32_t cdqscpe : 1;
3779 /* FID scope - Reserved - 7:11 */
3780 uint32_t fsp_reserved : 5;
3781 } fis[256];
3782};
3783SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_feature_ids_effects_log_page) == 1024, "Incorrect size");
3784
3785/**
3786 * Error information log page (\ref SPDK_NVME_LOG_ERROR)
3787 */
3788struct spdk_nvme_error_information_entry {
3789 uint64_t error_count;
3790 uint16_t sqid;
3791 uint16_t cid;
3792 struct spdk_nvme_status status;
3793 uint16_t error_location;
3794 uint64_t lba;
3795 uint32_t nsid;
3796 uint8_t vendor_specific;
3797 uint8_t trtype;
3798 uint8_t reserved30[2];
3799 uint64_t command_specific;
3800 uint16_t trtype_specific;
3801 uint8_t reserved42[22];
3802};
3803SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_error_information_entry) == 64, "Incorrect size");
3804
3805/**
3806 * SMART / health information page (\ref SPDK_NVME_LOG_HEALTH_INFORMATION)
3807 */
3808#pragma pack(push, 1)
3809struct spdk_nvme_health_information_page {
3810 union spdk_nvme_critical_warning_state critical_warning;
3811
3812 uint16_t temperature;
3813 uint8_t available_spare;
3814 uint8_t available_spare_threshold;
3815 uint8_t percentage_used;
3816
3817 uint8_t reserved[26];
3818
3819 /*
3820 * Note that the following are 128-bit values, but are
3821 * defined as an array of 2 64-bit values.
3822 */
3823 /* Data Units Read is always in 512-byte units. */
3824 uint64_t data_units_read[2];
3825 /* Data Units Written is always in 512-byte units. */
3826 uint64_t data_units_written[2];
3827 /* For NVM command set, this includes Compare commands. */
3828 uint64_t host_read_commands[2];
3829 uint64_t host_write_commands[2];
3830 /* Controller Busy Time is reported in minutes. */
3831 uint64_t controller_busy_time[2];
3832 uint64_t power_cycles[2];
3833 uint64_t power_on_hours[2];
3834 uint64_t unsafe_shutdowns[2];
3835 uint64_t media_errors[2];
3836 uint64_t num_error_info_log_entries[2];
3837 /* Controller temperature related. */
3838 uint32_t warning_temp_time;
3839 uint32_t critical_temp_time;
3840 uint16_t temp_sensor[8];
3841
3842 uint8_t reserved2[296];
3843};
3844SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_health_information_page) == 512, "Incorrect size");
3845#pragma pack(pop)
3846
3847/* Commands Supported and Effects Data Structure */
3848struct spdk_nvme_cmds_and_effect_entry {
3849 /** Command Supported */
3850 uint16_t csupp : 1;
3851
3852 /** Logic Block Content Change */
3853 uint16_t lbcc : 1;
3854
3855 /** Namespace Capability Change */
3856 uint16_t ncc : 1;
3857
3858 /** Namespace Inventory Change */
3859 uint16_t nic : 1;
3860
3861 /** Controller Capability Change */
3862 uint16_t ccc : 1;
3863
3864 uint16_t reserved1 : 11;
3865
3866 /* Command Submission and Execution recommendation
3867 * 000 - No command submission or execution restriction
3868 * 001 - Submitted when there is no outstanding command to same NS
3869 * 010 - Submitted when there is no outstanding command to any NS
3870 * others - Reserved
3871 * \ref command_submission_and_execution in section 5.14.1.5 NVMe Revision 1.3
3872 */
3873 uint16_t cse : 3;
3874
3875 /** UUID Selection Supported */
3876 uint16_t uss : 1;
3877
3878 /** Command Scope bits (CSP) */
3879
3880 /** Namespace Scope */
3881 uint16_t nscpe : 1;
3882
3883 /** Controller Scope */
3884 uint16_t cscpe : 1;
3885
3886 /** NVM Set Scope */
3887 uint16_t nsetscpe : 1;
3888
3889 /** Endurance Group Scope */
3890 uint16_t egscpe : 1;
3891
3892 /** Domain Scope */
3893 uint16_t dscpe : 1;
3894
3895 /** NVM Subsystem Scope */
3896 uint16_t nsscpe : 1;
3897
3898 uint16_t csp_reserved : 6;
3899};
3900
3901/* Commands Supported and Effects Log Page */
3902struct spdk_nvme_cmds_and_effect_log_page {
3903 /** Commands Supported and Effects Data Structure for the Admin Commands */
3904 struct spdk_nvme_cmds_and_effect_entry admin_cmds_supported[256];
3905
3906 /** Commands Supported and Effects Data Structure for the IO Commands */
3907 struct spdk_nvme_cmds_and_effect_entry io_cmds_supported[256];
3908
3909 uint8_t reserved0[2048];
3910};
3911SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_cmds_and_effect_log_page) == 4096, "Incorrect size");
3912
3913/*
3914 * Get Log Page – Telemetry Host/Controller Initiated Log (Log Identifiers 07h/08h)
3915 */
3916struct spdk_nvme_telemetry_log_page_hdr {
3917 /* Log page identifier */
3918 uint8_t lpi;
3919 uint8_t rsvd[4];
3920 uint8_t ieee_oui[3];
3921 /* Data area 1 last block */
3922 uint16_t dalb1;
3923 /* Data area 2 last block */
3924 uint16_t dalb2;
3925 /* Data area 3 last block */
3926 uint16_t dalb3;
3927 uint8_t rsvd1[368];
3928 /* Controller initiated data avail */
3929 uint8_t ctrlr_avail;
3930 /* Controller initiated telemetry data generation */
3931 uint8_t ctrlr_gen;
3932 /* Reason identifier */
3933 uint8_t rsnident[128];
3934 uint8_t telemetry_datablock[0];
3935};
3936SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_telemetry_log_page_hdr) == 512, "Incorrect size");
3937
3938/**
3939 * Sanitize Status Type
3940 */
3941enum spdk_nvme_sanitize_status_type {
3942 SPDK_NVME_NEVER_BEEN_SANITIZED = 0x0,
3943 SPDK_NVME_RECENT_SANITIZE_SUCCESSFUL = 0x1,
3944 SPDK_NVME_SANITIZE_IN_PROGRESS = 0x2,
3945 SPDK_NVME_SANITIZE_FAILED = 0x3,
3946};
3947
3948/**
3949 * Sanitize status sstat field
3950 */
3951struct spdk_nvme_sanitize_status_sstat {
3952 uint16_t status : 3;
3953 uint16_t complete_pass : 5;
3954 uint16_t global_data_erase : 1;
3955 uint16_t reserved : 7;
3956};
3957
3958/**
3959 * Sanitize log page
3960 */
3961struct spdk_nvme_sanitize_status_log_page {
3962 /* Sanitize progress */
3963 uint16_t sprog;
3964 /* Sanitize status */
3965 struct spdk_nvme_sanitize_status_sstat sstat;
3966 /* CDW10 of sanitize command */
3967 uint32_t scdw10;
3968 /* Estimated overwrite time in seconds */
3969 uint32_t et_overwrite;
3970 /* Estimated block erase time in seconds */
3971 uint32_t et_block_erase;
3972 /* Estimated crypto erase time in seconds */
3973 uint32_t et_crypto_erase;
3974 uint8_t reserved[492];
3975};
3976SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_sanitize_status_log_page) == 512, "Incorrect size");
3977
3978/**
3979 * Asynchronous Event Type
3980 */
3981enum spdk_nvme_async_event_type {
3982 /* Error Status */
3983 SPDK_NVME_ASYNC_EVENT_TYPE_ERROR = 0x0,
3984 /* SMART/Health Status */
3985 SPDK_NVME_ASYNC_EVENT_TYPE_SMART = 0x1,
3986 /* Notice */
3987 SPDK_NVME_ASYNC_EVENT_TYPE_NOTICE = 0x2,
3988 /* 0x3 - 0x5 Reserved */
3989
3990 /* I/O Command Set Specific Status */
3991 SPDK_NVME_ASYNC_EVENT_TYPE_IO = 0x6,
3992 /* Vendor Specific */
3993 SPDK_NVME_ASYNC_EVENT_TYPE_VENDOR = 0x7,
3994};
3995
3996/**
3997 * Asynchronous Event Information for Error Status
3998 */
3999enum spdk_nvme_async_event_info_error {
4000 /* Write to Invalid Doorbell Register */
4001 SPDK_NVME_ASYNC_EVENT_WRITE_INVALID_DB = 0x0,
4002 /* Invalid Doorbell Register Write Value */
4003 SPDK_NVME_ASYNC_EVENT_INVALID_DB_WRITE = 0x1,
4004 /* Diagnostic Failure */
4005 SPDK_NVME_ASYNC_EVENT_DIAGNOSTIC_FAILURE = 0x2,
4006 /* Persistent Internal Error */
4007 SPDK_NVME_ASYNC_EVENT_PERSISTENT_INTERNAL = 0x3,
4008 /* Transient Internal Error */
4009 SPDK_NVME_ASYNC_EVENT_TRANSIENT_INTERNAL = 0x4,
4010 /* Firmware Image Load Error */
4011 SPDK_NVME_ASYNC_EVENT_FW_IMAGE_LOAD = 0x5,
4012
4013 /* 0x6 - 0xFF Reserved */
4014};
4015
4016/**
4017 * Asynchronous Event Information for SMART/Health Status
4018 */
4019enum spdk_nvme_async_event_info_smart {
4020 /* NVM Subsystem Reliability */
4021 SPDK_NVME_ASYNC_EVENT_SUBSYSTEM_RELIABILITY = 0x0,
4022 /* Temperature Threshold */
4023 SPDK_NVME_ASYNC_EVENT_TEMPERATURE_THRESHOLD = 0x1,
4024 /* Spare Below Threshold */
4025 SPDK_NVME_ASYNC_EVENT_SPARE_BELOW_THRESHOLD = 0x2,
4026
4027 /* 0x3 - 0xFF Reserved */
4028};
4029
4030/**
4031 * Asynchronous Event Information for Notice
4032 */
4033enum spdk_nvme_async_event_info_notice {
4034 /* Namespace Attribute Changed */
4035 SPDK_NVME_ASYNC_EVENT_NS_ATTR_CHANGED = 0x0,
4036 /* Firmware Activation Starting */
4037 SPDK_NVME_ASYNC_EVENT_FW_ACTIVATION_START = 0x1,
4038 /* Telemetry Log Changed */
4039 SPDK_NVME_ASYNC_EVENT_TELEMETRY_LOG_CHANGED = 0x2,
4040 /* Asymmetric Namespace Access Change */
4041 SPDK_NVME_ASYNC_EVENT_ANA_CHANGE = 0x3,
4042
4043 /* 0x4 - 0xEF Reserved */
4044
4045 /** Discovery log change event(refer to the NVMe over Fabrics specification) */
4046 SPDK_NVME_ASYNC_EVENT_DISCOVERY_LOG_CHANGE = 0xF0,
4047
4048 /* 0xF1 - 0xFF Reserved */
4049};
4050
4051/**
4052 * Asynchronous Event Information for NVM Command Set Specific Status
4053 */
4054enum spdk_nvme_async_event_info_nvm_command_set {
4055 /* Reservation Log Page Available */
4056 SPDK_NVME_ASYNC_EVENT_RESERVATION_LOG_AVAIL = 0x0,
4057 /* Sanitize Operation Completed */
4058 SPDK_NVME_ASYNC_EVENT_SANITIZE_COMPLETED = 0x1,
4059
4060 /* 0x2 - 0xFF Reserved */
4061};
4062
4063/**
4064 * Asynchronous Event Request Completion
4065 */
4066union spdk_nvme_async_event_completion {
4067 uint32_t raw;
4068 struct {
4069 uint32_t async_event_type : 3;
4070 uint32_t reserved1 : 5;
4071 uint32_t async_event_info : 8;
4072 uint32_t log_page_identifier : 8;
4073 uint32_t reserved2 : 8;
4074 } bits;
4075};
4076SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(union spdk_nvme_async_event_completion) == 4, "Incorrect size");
4077
4078/**
4079 * Firmware slot information page (\ref SPDK_NVME_LOG_FIRMWARE_SLOT)
4080 */
4081struct spdk_nvme_firmware_page {
4082 struct {
4083 uint8_t active_slot : 3; /**< Slot for current FW */
4084 uint8_t reserved3 : 1;
4085 uint8_t next_reset_slot : 3; /**< Slot that will be active at next controller reset */
4086 uint8_t reserved7 : 1;
4087 } afi;
4088
4089 uint8_t reserved[7];
4090 uint8_t revision[7][8]; /** Revisions for 7 slots (ASCII strings) */
4091 uint8_t reserved2[448];
4092};
4093SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_firmware_page) == 512, "Incorrect size");
4094
4095/**
4096 * Asymmetric Namespace Access page (\ref SPDK_NVME_LOG_ASYMMETRIC_NAMESPACE_ACCESS)
4097 */
4098struct spdk_nvme_ana_page {
4099 uint64_t change_count;
4100 uint16_t num_ana_group_desc;
4101 uint8_t reserved[6];
4102};
4103SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_ana_page) == 16, "Incorrect size");
4104
4105/* Asymmetric namespace access state */
4106enum spdk_nvme_ana_state {
4107 SPDK_NVME_ANA_OPTIMIZED_STATE = 0x1,
4108 SPDK_NVME_ANA_NON_OPTIMIZED_STATE = 0x2,
4109 SPDK_NVME_ANA_INACCESSIBLE_STATE = 0x3,
4110 SPDK_NVME_ANA_PERSISTENT_LOSS_STATE = 0x4,
4111 SPDK_NVME_ANA_CHANGE_STATE = 0xF,
4112};
4113
4114/* ANA group descriptor */
4115struct spdk_nvme_ana_group_descriptor {
4116 uint32_t ana_group_id;
4117 uint32_t num_of_nsid;
4118 uint64_t change_count;
4119
4120 uint8_t ana_state : 4;
4121 uint8_t reserved0 : 4;
4122
4123 uint8_t reserved1[15];
4124
4125 uint32_t nsid[];
4126};
4127SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_ana_group_descriptor) == 32, "Incorrect size");
4128
4129/* Reclaim unit handle type */
4130enum spdk_nvme_fdp_ruh_type {
4131 /* 0x0 Reserved */
4132
4133 /* Reclaim unit handle type initially isolated */
4134 SPDK_NVME_FDP_RUHT_INITIALLY_ISOLATED = 0x1,
4135 /* Reclaim unit handle type persistently isolated */
4136 SPDK_NVME_FDP_RUHT_PERSISTENTLY_ISOLATED = 0x2,
4137
4138 /* 0x3 - 0xBF Reserved */
4139
4140 /* 0xC0 - 0xFF Vendor specific */
4141};
4142
4143/* Reclaim unit handle descriptor */
4144struct spdk_nvme_fdp_ruh_descriptor {
4145 /* Reclaim unit handle type */
4146 uint8_t ruht;
4147 uint8_t reserved[3];
4148};
4149SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_fdp_ruh_descriptor) == 4, "Incorrect size");
4150
4151/* FDP configuration descriptor */
4152struct spdk_nvme_fdp_cfg_descriptor {
4153 /* Descriptor size */
4154 uint16_t ds;
4155
4156 /* FDP attributes */
4157 union {
4158 uint8_t raw;
4159 struct {
4160 /* Reclaim group identifier format */
4161 uint8_t rgif : 4;
4162 /* FDP volatile write cache */
4163 uint8_t fdpvwc : 1;
4164 uint8_t rsvd1 : 2;
4165 /* FDP configuration valid */
4166 uint8_t fdpcv : 1;
4167 } bits;
4168 } fdpa;
4169
4170 /* Vendor specific size */
4171 uint8_t vss;
4172 /* Number of reclaim groups */
4173 uint32_t nrg;
4174 /* Number of reclaim unit handles */
4175 uint16_t nruh;
4176 /* Max placement identifiers */
4177 uint16_t maxpids;
4178 /* Number of namespaces supported */
4179 uint32_t nns;
4180 /* Reclaim unit nominal size */
4181 uint64_t runs;
4182 /* Estimated reclaim unit time limit */
4183 uint32_t erutl;
4184 uint8_t rsvd28[36];
4185 struct spdk_nvme_fdp_ruh_descriptor ruh_desc[];
4186};
4187SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_fdp_cfg_descriptor) == 64, "Incorrect size");
4188
4189/* FDP configurations log page (\ref SPDK_NVME_LOG_FDP_CONFIGURATIONS) */
4190struct spdk_nvme_fdp_cfg_log_page {
4191 /* Number of FDP configurations */
4192 uint16_t ncfg;
4193 /* Version of log page */
4194 uint8_t version;
4195 uint8_t reserved1;
4196 /* Size of this log page in bytes */
4197 uint32_t size;
4198 uint8_t reserved2[8];
4199 struct spdk_nvme_fdp_cfg_descriptor cfg_desc[];
4200};
4201SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_fdp_cfg_log_page) == 16, "Incorrect size");
4202
4203/* Reclaim unit handle attributes */
4204enum spdk_nvme_fdp_ruh_attributes {
4205 /* Not used by a namespace */
4206 SPDK_NVME_FDP_RUHA_UNUSED = 0x0,
4207 /* Use a specific reclaim unit handle */
4208 SPDK_NVME_FDP_RUHA_HOST_SPECIFIED = 0x1,
4209 /* Use the only default reclaim unit handle */
4210 SPDK_NVME_FDP_RUHA_CTRLR_SPECIFIED = 0x2,
4211
4212 /* 0x3 - 0xFF Reserved */
4213};
4214
4215/* Reclaim unit handle usage descriptor */
4216struct spdk_nvme_fdp_ruhu_descriptor {
4217 /* Reclaim unit handle attributes */
4218 uint8_t ruha;
4219 uint8_t reserved[7];
4220};
4221SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_fdp_ruhu_descriptor) == 8, "Incorrect size");
4222
4223/* Reclaim unit handle usage log page (\ref SPDK_NVME_LOG_RECLAIM_UNIT_HANDLE_USAGE) */
4224struct spdk_nvme_fdp_ruhu_log_page {
4225 /* Number of Reclaim Unit Handles */
4226 uint16_t nruh;
4227 uint8_t reserved[6];
4228 struct spdk_nvme_fdp_ruhu_descriptor ruhu_desc[];
4229};
4230SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_fdp_ruhu_log_page) == 8, "Incorrect size");
4231
4232/* FDP statistics log page (\ref SPDK_NVME_LOG_FDP_STATISTICS) */
4233struct spdk_nvme_fdp_stats_log_page {
4234 /* Host bytes with metadata written */
4235 uint64_t hbmw[2];
4236 /* Media bytes with metadata written */
4237 uint64_t mbmw[2];
4238 /* Media bytes erased */
4239 uint64_t mbe[2];
4240 uint8_t rsvd48[16];
4241};
4242SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_fdp_stats_log_page) == 64, "Incorrect size");
4243
4244/* FDP report event types (cdw10 log specific parameter) */
4245enum spdk_nvme_fdp_report_event_type {
4246 /* Report FDP controller events */
4247 SPDK_NVME_FDP_REPORT_CTRL_EVENTS = 0x0,
4248 /* Report FDP host events */
4249 SPDK_NVME_FDP_REPORT_HOST_EVENTS = 0x1,
4250};
4251
4252/* FDP event type */
4253enum spdk_nvme_fdp_event_type {
4254 /* FDP host events */
4255 /* Reclaim unit not fully written to capacity */
4256 SPDK_NVME_FDP_EVENT_RU_NOT_WRITTEN_CAPACITY = 0x0,
4257 /* Reclaim unit time limit exceeded */
4258 SPDK_NVME_FDP_EVENT_RU_TIME_LIMIT_EXCEEDED = 0x1,
4259 /* Controller reset modified reclaim unit handles */
4260 SPDK_NVME_FDP_EVENT_CTRLR_RESET_MODIFY_RUH = 0x2,
4261 /* Invalid placement identifier */
4262 SPDK_NVME_FDP_EVENT_INVALID_PLACEMENT_ID = 0x3,
4263
4264 /* 0x4 - 0x6F Reserved */
4265
4266 /* 0x70 - 0x7F Vendor specific */
4267
4268 /* FDP controller events */
4269 /* Media reallocated */
4270 SPDK_NVME_FDP_EVENT_MEDIA_REALLOCATED = 0x80,
4271 /* Implicitly modified reclaim unit handle */
4272 SPDK_NVME_FDP_EVENT_IMPLICIT_MODIFIED_RUH = 0x81,
4273
4274 /* 0x82 - 0xEF Reserved */
4275
4276 /* 0xF0 - 0xFF Vendor specific */
4277};
4278
4279/* Media reallocated */
4280#pragma pack(push, 1)
4281struct spdk_nvme_fdp_event_media_reallocated {
4282 /* Specific event flags */
4283 union {
4284 uint8_t raw;
4285 struct {
4286 /* LBA valid */
4287 uint8_t lbav : 1;
4288 uint8_t reserved : 7;
4289 } bits;
4290 } sef;
4291
4292 uint8_t reserved1;
4293 /* Number of LBAs moved */
4294 uint16_t nlbam;
4295 /* Logical block address */
4296 uint64_t lba;
4297 uint8_t reserved2[4];
4298};
4299SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_fdp_event_media_reallocated) == 16, "Incorrect size");
4300
4301/* FDP event */
4302struct spdk_nvme_fdp_event {
4303 /* Event type */
4304 uint8_t etype;
4305
4306 /* FDP event flags */
4307 union {
4308 uint8_t raw;
4309 struct {
4310 /* Placement identifier valid */
4311 uint8_t piv : 1;
4312 /* NSID valid */
4313 uint8_t nsidv : 1;
4314 /* Location valid */
4315 uint8_t lv : 1;
4316 uint8_t reserved : 5;
4317 } bits;
4318 } fdpef;
4319
4320 /* Placement identifier */
4321 uint16_t pid;
4322 /* Event timestamp */
4323 uint64_t timestamp;
4324 /* Namespace identifier */
4325 uint32_t nsid;
4326 /* Event type specific */
4327 uint64_t event_type_specific[2];
4328 /* Reclaim group identifier */
4329 uint16_t rgid;
4330 /* Reclaim unit handle identifier */
4331 uint16_t ruhid;
4332 uint8_t reserved[4];
4333 uint8_t vs[24];
4334};
4335SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_fdp_event) == 64, "Incorrect size");
4336#pragma pack(pop)
4337
4338/* FDP events log page (\ref SPDK_NVME_LOG_FDP_EVENTS) */
4339struct spdk_nvme_fdp_events_log_page {
4340 /* Number of FDP events */
4341 uint32_t nevents;
4342 uint8_t reserved[60];
4343 struct spdk_nvme_fdp_event event[];
4344};
4345SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_fdp_events_log_page) == 64, "Incorrect size");
4346
4347/**
4348 * Namespace attachment Type Encoding
4349 */
4350enum spdk_nvme_ns_attach_type {
4351 /* Controller attach */
4352 SPDK_NVME_NS_CTRLR_ATTACH = 0x0,
4353
4354 /* Controller detach */
4355 SPDK_NVME_NS_CTRLR_DETACH = 0x1,
4356
4357 /* 0x2-0xF - Reserved */
4358};
4359
4360/**
4361 * Namespace management Type Encoding
4362 */
4363enum spdk_nvme_ns_management_type {
4364 /* Create */
4365 SPDK_NVME_NS_MANAGEMENT_CREATE = 0x0,
4366
4367 /* Delete */
4368 SPDK_NVME_NS_MANAGEMENT_DELETE = 0x1,
4369
4370 /* 0x2-0xF - Reserved */
4371};
4372
4373struct spdk_nvme_ns_list {
4374 uint32_t ns_list[1024];
4375};
4376SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_ns_list) == 4096, "Incorrect size");
4377
4378/**
4379 * Namespace identification descriptor type
4380 *
4381 * \sa spdk_nvme_ns_id_desc
4382 */
4383enum spdk_nvme_nidt {
4384 /** IEEE Extended Unique Identifier */
4385 SPDK_NVME_NIDT_EUI64 = 0x01,
4386
4387 /** Namespace GUID */
4388 SPDK_NVME_NIDT_NGUID = 0x02,
4389
4390 /** Namespace UUID */
4391 SPDK_NVME_NIDT_UUID = 0x03,
4392
4393 /** Namespace Command Set Identifier */
4394 SPDK_NVME_NIDT_CSI = 0x04,
4395};
4396
4397struct spdk_nvme_ns_id_desc {
4398 /** Namespace identifier type */
4399 uint8_t nidt;
4400
4401 /** Namespace identifier length (length of nid field) */
4402 uint8_t nidl;
4403
4404 uint8_t reserved2;
4405 uint8_t reserved3;
4406
4407 /** Namespace identifier */
4408 uint8_t nid[];
4409};
4410SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_ns_id_desc) == 4, "Incorrect size");
4411
4412struct spdk_nvme_ctrlr_list {
4413 uint16_t ctrlr_count;
4414 uint16_t ctrlr_list[2047];
4415};
4416SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_ctrlr_list) == 4096, "Incorrect size");
4417
4418enum spdk_nvme_csi {
4419 SPDK_NVME_CSI_NVM = 0x0,
4420 SPDK_NVME_CSI_KV = 0x1,
4421 SPDK_NVME_CSI_ZNS = 0x2,
4422};
4423
4424enum spdk_nvme_secure_erase_setting {
4425 SPDK_NVME_FMT_NVM_SES_NO_SECURE_ERASE = 0x0,
4426 SPDK_NVME_FMT_NVM_SES_USER_DATA_ERASE = 0x1,
4427 SPDK_NVME_FMT_NVM_SES_CRYPTO_ERASE = 0x2,
4428};
4429
4430enum spdk_nvme_pi_location {
4431 SPDK_NVME_FMT_NVM_PROTECTION_AT_TAIL = 0x0,
4432 SPDK_NVME_FMT_NVM_PROTECTION_AT_HEAD = 0x1,
4433};
4434
4435enum spdk_nvme_pi_type {
4436 SPDK_NVME_FMT_NVM_PROTECTION_DISABLE = 0x0,
4437 SPDK_NVME_FMT_NVM_PROTECTION_TYPE1 = 0x1,
4438 SPDK_NVME_FMT_NVM_PROTECTION_TYPE2 = 0x2,
4439 SPDK_NVME_FMT_NVM_PROTECTION_TYPE3 = 0x3,
4440};
4441
4442enum spdk_nvme_metadata_setting {
4443 SPDK_NVME_FMT_NVM_METADATA_TRANSFER_AS_BUFFER = 0x0,
4444 SPDK_NVME_FMT_NVM_METADATA_TRANSFER_AS_LBA = 0x1,
4445};
4446
4447/* Format - Command Dword 10 */
4448struct spdk_nvme_format {
4449 /* LBA format lower (LSB 4 bits of format index), also called lbafl in 2.0 spec */
4450 uint32_t lbaf : 4;
4451 /* Metadata settings, also called mset in 2.0 spec */
4452 uint32_t ms : 1;
4453 /* Protection information */
4454 uint32_t pi : 3;
4455 /* Protection information location */
4456 uint32_t pil : 1;
4457 /* Secure erase settings */
4458 uint32_t ses : 3;
4459 /* LBA format upper (MSB 2 bits of format index) */
4460 uint32_t lbafu : 2;
4461 uint32_t reserved : 18;
4462};
4463SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_format) == 4, "Incorrect size");
4464
4465struct spdk_nvme_protection_info {
4466 uint16_t guard;
4467 uint16_t app_tag;
4468 uint32_t ref_tag;
4469};
4470SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_protection_info) == 8, "Incorrect size");
4471
4472/* Data structures for sanitize command */
4473/* Sanitize - Command Dword 10 */
4474struct spdk_nvme_sanitize {
4475 /* Sanitize Action (SANACT) */
4476 uint32_t sanact : 3;
4477 /* Allow Unrestricted Sanitize Exit (AUSE) */
4478 uint32_t ause : 1;
4479 /* Overwrite Pass Count (OWPASS) */
4480 uint32_t owpass : 4;
4481 /* Overwrite Invert Pattern Between Passes */
4482 uint32_t oipbp : 1;
4483 /* No Deallocate after sanitize (NDAS) */
4484 uint32_t ndas : 1;
4485 /* reserved */
4486 uint32_t reserved : 22;
4487};
4488SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_sanitize) == 4, "Incorrect size");
4489
4490/* Sanitize Action */
4491enum spdk_sanitize_action {
4492 /* Exit Failure Mode */
4493 SPDK_NVME_SANITIZE_EXIT_FAILURE_MODE = 0x1,
4494 /* Start a Block Erase sanitize operation */
4495 SPDK_NVME_SANITIZE_BLOCK_ERASE = 0x2,
4496 /* Start an Overwrite sanitize operation */
4497 SPDK_NVME_SANITIZE_OVERWRITE = 0x3,
4498 /* Start a Crypto Erase sanitize operation */
4499 SPDK_NVME_SANITIZE_CRYPTO_ERASE = 0x4,
4500};
4501
4502/** Parameters for SPDK_NVME_OPC_FIRMWARE_COMMIT cdw10: commit action */
4503enum spdk_nvme_fw_commit_action {
4504 /**
4505 * Downloaded image replaces the image specified by
4506 * the Firmware Slot field. This image is not activated.
4507 */
4508 SPDK_NVME_FW_COMMIT_REPLACE_IMG = 0x0,
4509 /**
4510 * Downloaded image replaces the image specified by
4511 * the Firmware Slot field. This image is activated at the next reset.
4512 */
4513 SPDK_NVME_FW_COMMIT_REPLACE_AND_ENABLE_IMG = 0x1,
4514 /**
4515 * The image specified by the Firmware Slot field is
4516 * activated at the next reset.
4517 */
4518 SPDK_NVME_FW_COMMIT_ENABLE_IMG = 0x2,
4519 /**
4520 * The image specified by the Firmware Slot field is
4521 * requested to be activated immediately without reset.
4522 */
4523 SPDK_NVME_FW_COMMIT_RUN_IMG = 0x3,
4524 /**
4525 * Downloaded image replaces the Boot Partition specified by
4526 * the Boot Partition ID field.
4527 */
4528 SPDK_NVME_FW_COMMIT_REPLACE_BOOT_PARTITION = 0x6,
4529 /**
4530 * Mark the Boot Partition specified in the BPID field as Active
4531 * and update BPINFO.ABPID.
4532 */
4533 SPDK_NVME_FW_COMMIT_ACTIVATE_BOOT_PARTITION = 0x7,
4534};
4535
4536/** Parameters for SPDK_NVME_OPC_FIRMWARE_COMMIT cdw10 */
4537struct spdk_nvme_fw_commit {
4538 /**
4539 * Firmware Slot. Specifies the firmware slot that shall be used for the
4540 * Commit Action. The controller shall choose the firmware slot (slot 1 - 7)
4541 * to use for the operation if the value specified is 0h.
4542 */
4543 uint32_t fs : 3;
4544 /**
4545 * Commit Action. Specifies the action that is taken on the image downloaded
4546 * with the Firmware Image Download command or on a previously downloaded and
4547 * placed image.
4548 */
4549 uint32_t ca : 3;
4550 uint32_t reserved : 25;
4551 /**
4552 * Boot Partition ID. Specifies the boot partition that shall be used for the
4553 * Commit Action.
4554 */
4555 uint32_t bpid : 1;
4556};
4557SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_fw_commit) == 4, "Incorrect size");
4558
4559/* ZNS Zone Send Action (ZSA) cdw13 */
4560enum spdk_nvme_zns_zone_send_action {
4561 SPDK_NVME_ZONE_CLOSE = 0x1,
4562 SPDK_NVME_ZONE_FINISH = 0x2,
4563 SPDK_NVME_ZONE_OPEN = 0x3,
4564 SPDK_NVME_ZONE_RESET = 0x4,
4565 SPDK_NVME_ZONE_OFFLINE = 0x5,
4566 SPDK_NVME_ZONE_SET_ZDE = 0x10,
4567};
4568
4569/* ZNS Zone Receive Action (ZRA) cdw13 */
4570enum spdk_nvme_zns_zone_receive_action {
4571 SPDK_NVME_ZONE_REPORT = 0x0,
4572 SPDK_NVME_ZONE_EXTENDED_REPORT = 0x1,
4573};
4574
4575enum spdk_nvme_zns_zra_report_opts {
4576 SPDK_NVME_ZRA_LIST_ALL = 0x0,
4577 SPDK_NVME_ZRA_LIST_ZSE = 0x1,
4578 SPDK_NVME_ZRA_LIST_ZSIO = 0x2,
4579 SPDK_NVME_ZRA_LIST_ZSEO = 0x3,
4580 SPDK_NVME_ZRA_LIST_ZSC = 0x4,
4581 SPDK_NVME_ZRA_LIST_ZSF = 0x5,
4582 SPDK_NVME_ZRA_LIST_ZSRO = 0x6,
4583 SPDK_NVME_ZRA_LIST_ZSO = 0x7,
4584};
4585
4586enum spdk_nvme_zns_zone_type {
4587 SPDK_NVME_ZONE_TYPE_SEQWR = 0x2,
4588};
4589
4590enum spdk_nvme_zns_zone_state {
4591 SPDK_NVME_ZONE_STATE_EMPTY = 0x1,
4592 SPDK_NVME_ZONE_STATE_IOPEN = 0x2,
4593 SPDK_NVME_ZONE_STATE_EOPEN = 0x3,
4594 SPDK_NVME_ZONE_STATE_CLOSED = 0x4,
4595 SPDK_NVME_ZONE_STATE_RONLY = 0xD,
4596 SPDK_NVME_ZONE_STATE_FULL = 0xE,
4597 SPDK_NVME_ZONE_STATE_OFFLINE = 0xF,
4598};
4599
4600struct spdk_nvme_zns_zone_desc {
4601 /** Zone Type */
4602 uint8_t zt : 4;
4603
4604 uint8_t rsvd0 : 4;
4605
4606 uint8_t rsvd1 : 4;
4607
4608 /** Zone State */
4609 uint8_t zs : 4;
4610
4611 /**
4612 * Zone Attributes
4613 */
4614 union {
4615 uint8_t raw;
4616
4617 struct {
4618 /** Zone Finished by controller */
4619 uint8_t zfc: 1;
4620
4621 /** Finish Zone Recommended */
4622 uint8_t fzr: 1;
4623
4624 /** Reset Zone Recommended */
4625 uint8_t rzr: 1;
4626
4627 uint8_t rsvd3 : 4;
4628
4629 /** Zone Descriptor Extension Valid */
4630 uint8_t zdev: 1;
4631 } bits;
4632 } za;
4633
4634 uint8_t reserved[5];
4635
4636 /** Zone Capacity (in number of LBAs) */
4637 uint64_t zcap;
4638
4639 /** Zone Start LBA */
4640 uint64_t zslba;
4641
4642 /** Write Pointer (LBA) */
4643 uint64_t wp;
4644
4645 uint8_t reserved32[32];
4646};
4647SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_zns_zone_desc) == 64, "Incorrect size");
4648
4649struct spdk_nvme_zns_zone_report {
4650 uint64_t nr_zones;
4651 uint8_t reserved8[56];
4652 struct spdk_nvme_zns_zone_desc descs[];
4653};
4654SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_zns_zone_report) == 64, "Incorrect size");
4655
4656/* Directives field */
4657enum spdk_nvme_directive_type {
4658 SPDK_NVME_DIRECTIVE_TYPE_IDENTIFY = 0x0,
4659 SPDK_NVME_DIRECTIVE_TYPE_STREAMS = 0x1,
4660 SPDK_NVME_DIRECTIVE_TYPE_DATA_PLACEMENT = 0x2,
4661};
4662
4663enum spdk_nvme_identify_directive_send_operation {
4664 SPDK_NVME_IDENTIFY_DIRECTIVE_SEND_ENABLED = 0x1,
4665};
4666
4667enum spdk_nvme_identify_directive_receive_operation {
4668 SPDK_NVME_IDENTIFY_DIRECTIVE_RECEIVE_RETURN_PARAM = 0x1,
4669};
4670
4671struct spdk_nvme_ns_identify_directive_param {
4672 struct {
4673 /* set to 1b to indicate that the Identify Directive is supported */
4674 uint8_t identify : 1;
4675 /* set to 1b if the Streams Directive is supported */
4676 uint8_t streams : 1;
4677 /* set to 1b if the Data Placement Directive is supported */
4678 uint8_t data_pd : 1;
4679 uint8_t reserved1 : 5;
4680 uint8_t reserved2[31];
4681 } directives_supported;
4682 struct {
4683 /* set to 1b to indicate that the Identify Directive is enabled */
4684 uint8_t identify : 1;
4685 /* set to 1b if the Streams Directive is enabled */
4686 uint8_t streams : 1;
4687 /* set to 1b if the Data Placement Directive is enabled */
4688 uint8_t data_pd : 1;
4689 uint8_t reserved1 : 5;
4690 uint8_t reserved2[31];
4691 } directives_enabled;
4692 struct {
4693 /**
4694 * cleared to 0b as the host is not able to change the state of
4695 * Identify Directive
4696 */
4697 uint8_t identify : 1;
4698 /**
4699 * cleared to 0b to indicate that the Streams Directive state
4700 * is not preserved across ctrl reset
4701 */
4702 uint8_t streams : 1;
4703 /**
4704 * set to 1b if the Data Placement Directive is supported to
4705 * indicate that the host specified Data Placement Directive
4706 * state is preserved across ctrl reset
4707 */
4708 uint8_t data_pd : 1;
4709 uint8_t reserved1 : 5;
4710 uint8_t reserved2[31];
4711 } directives_persistence;
4712
4713 uint32_t reserved[1000];
4714};
4715SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_ns_identify_directive_param) == 4096, "Incorrect size");
4716
4717enum spdk_nvme_streams_directive_receive_operation {
4718 SPDK_NVME_STREAMS_DIRECTIVE_RECEIVE_RETURN_PARAM = 0x1,
4719 SPDK_NVME_STREAMS_DIRECTIVE_RECEIVE_GET_STATUS = 0x2,
4720 SPDK_NVME_STREAMS_DIRECTIVE_RECEIVE_ALLOCATE_RESOURCE = 0x3,
4721};
4722
4723enum spdk_nvme_streams_directive_send_operation {
4724 SPDK_NVME_STREAMS_DIRECTIVE_SEND_RELEASE_ID = 0x1,
4725 SPDK_NVME_STREAMS_DIRECTIVE_SEND_RELEASE_RESOURCE = 0x2,
4726};
4727
4728struct spdk_nvme_ns_streams_data {
4729 /* MAX Streams Limit */
4730 uint16_t msl;
4731 /* NVM Subsystem Streams Available */
4732 uint16_t nssa;
4733 /* NVM Subsystem Streams Open */
4734 uint16_t nsso;
4735 /* NVM Subsystem Stream Capability */
4736 struct {
4737 /* Stream ID may be shared by multiple host IDs if set to 1. */
4738 uint8_t ssid : 1;
4739 uint8_t reserved : 7;
4740 } nssc;
4741 uint8_t reserved1[9];
4742 /* Namespace Specific Fields
4743 * Stream Write Size */
4744 uint32_t sws;
4745 /* Stream Granularity Size */
4746 uint16_t sgs;
4747 /* Namespace and Host Identifier Specific Fields
4748 * Namespace Streams Allocated */
4749 uint16_t nsa;
4750 /* Namespace Streams Open */
4751 uint16_t nso;
4752 uint8_t reserved2[6];
4753};
4754SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_ns_streams_data) == 32, "Incorrect size");
4755
4756struct spdk_nvme_ns_streams_status {
4757 /* Open Stream Count, this field specifies the number of streams that are currently open */
4758 uint16_t open_streams_count;
4759
4760 /* Stream Identifier, this field specifies the open stream identifier */
4761 uint16_t stream_id[65535];
4762};
4763SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct spdk_nvme_ns_streams_status) == 131072, "Incorrect size");
4764
4765enum spdk_nvme_ctrlr_type {
4766 /* 0x00 - reserved */
4767
4768 /* I/O Controller */
4769 SPDK_NVME_CTRLR_IO = 0x1,
4770
4771 /* Discovery Controller */
4772 SPDK_NVME_CTRLR_DISCOVERY = 0x2,
4773
4774 /* Administrative Controller */
4775 SPDK_NVME_CTRLR_ADMINISTRATIVE = 0x3,
4776
4777 /* 0x4-0xFF - Reserved */
4778};
4779
4780#define spdk_nvme_cpl_is_error(cpl) \
4781 ((cpl)->status.sc != SPDK_NVME_SC_SUCCESS || \
4782 (cpl)->status.sct != SPDK_NVME_SCT_GENERIC)
4783
4784#define spdk_nvme_cpl_is_success(cpl) (!spdk_nvme_cpl_is_error(cpl))
4785
4786#define spdk_nvme_cpl_is_pi_error(cpl) \
4787 ((cpl)->status.sct == SPDK_NVME_SCT_MEDIA_ERROR && \
4788 ((cpl)->status.sc == SPDK_NVME_SC_GUARD_CHECK_ERROR || \
4789 (cpl)->status.sc == SPDK_NVME_SC_APPLICATION_TAG_CHECK_ERROR || \
4790 (cpl)->status.sc == SPDK_NVME_SC_REFERENCE_TAG_CHECK_ERROR))
4791
4792#define spdk_nvme_cpl_is_abort_success(cpl) \
4793 (spdk_nvme_cpl_is_success(cpl) && !((cpl)->cdw0 & 1U))
4794
4795#define spdk_nvme_cpl_is_path_error(cpl) \
4796 ((cpl)->status.sct == SPDK_NVME_SCT_PATH)
4797
4798#define spdk_nvme_cpl_is_ana_error(cpl) \
4799 ((cpl)->status.sct == SPDK_NVME_SCT_PATH && \
4800 ((cpl)->status.sc == SPDK_NVME_SC_ASYMMETRIC_ACCESS_PERSISTENT_LOSS || \
4801 (cpl)->status.sc == SPDK_NVME_SC_ASYMMETRIC_ACCESS_INACCESSIBLE || \
4802 (cpl)->status.sc == SPDK_NVME_SC_ASYMMETRIC_ACCESS_TRANSITION))
4803
4804#define spdk_nvme_cpl_is_aborted_sq_deletion(cpl) \
4805 ((cpl)->status.sct == SPDK_NVME_SCT_GENERIC && \
4806 (cpl)->status.sc == SPDK_NVME_SC_ABORTED_SQ_DELETION)
4807
4808#define spdk_nvme_cpl_is_aborted_by_request(cpl) \
4809 ((cpl)->status.sct == SPDK_NVME_SCT_GENERIC && \
4810 (cpl)->status.sc == SPDK_NVME_SC_ABORTED_BY_REQUEST)
4811
4812/** Set fused operation */
4813#define SPDK_NVME_IO_FLAGS_FUSE_FIRST (SPDK_NVME_CMD_FUSE_FIRST << 0)
4814#define SPDK_NVME_IO_FLAGS_FUSE_SECOND (SPDK_NVME_CMD_FUSE_SECOND << 0)
4815#define SPDK_NVME_IO_FLAGS_FUSE_MASK (SPDK_NVME_CMD_FUSE_MASK << 0)
4816
4817/* Bits 20-31 of SPDK_NVME_IO_FLAGS map directly to their associated bits in
4818 * cdw12 for NVMe IO commands
4819 */
4820/** For enabling directive types on write-oriented commands */
4821#define SPDK_NVME_IO_FLAGS_DIRECTIVE(dtype) (dtype << 20)
4822#define SPDK_NVME_IO_FLAGS_STREAMS_DIRECTIVE \
4823 SPDK_NVME_IO_FLAGS_DIRECTIVE(SPDK_NVME_DIRECTIVE_TYPE_STREAMS)
4824#define SPDK_NVME_IO_FLAGS_DATA_PLACEMENT_DIRECTIVE \
4825 SPDK_NVME_IO_FLAGS_DIRECTIVE(SPDK_NVME_DIRECTIVE_TYPE_DATA_PLACEMENT)
4826/** Zone append specific, determines the contents of the reference tag written to the media */
4827#define SPDK_NVME_IO_FLAGS_ZONE_APPEND_PIREMAP (1U << 25)
4828/** Enable protection information checking of the Logical Block Reference Tag field */
4829#define SPDK_NVME_IO_FLAGS_PRCHK_REFTAG (1U << 26)
4830/** Enable protection information checking of the Application Tag field */
4831#define SPDK_NVME_IO_FLAGS_PRCHK_APPTAG (1U << 27)
4832/** Enable protection information checking of the Guard field */
4833#define SPDK_NVME_IO_FLAGS_PRCHK_GUARD (1U << 28)
4834/** The protection information is stripped or inserted when set this bit */
4835#define SPDK_NVME_IO_FLAGS_PRACT (1U << 29)
4836#define SPDK_NVME_IO_FLAGS_FORCE_UNIT_ACCESS (1U << 30)
4837#define SPDK_NVME_IO_FLAGS_LIMITED_RETRY (1U << 31)
4838
4839/** Mask of valid io flags mask */
4840#define SPDK_NVME_IO_FLAGS_VALID_MASK 0xFFFF0003
4841#define SPDK_NVME_IO_FLAGS_CDW12_MASK 0xFFFF0000
4842#define SPDK_NVME_IO_FLAGS_PRCHK_MASK 0x1C000000
4843
4844/** Identify command buffer response size */
4845#define SPDK_NVME_IDENTIFY_BUFLEN 4096
4846
4847#ifdef __cplusplus
4848}
4849#endif
4850
4851#endif

Runtime and compile-time assert macros.

#define SPDK_STATIC_ASSERT(cond, msg)
Compatibility wrapper for static_assert.
